name: Kelly D.
subject: Did you read Katie Porter’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| Checking in:
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JHAUByLxs9iIiZGTDoEUWJlJyg3wKJkizLBjZuUdG8A)
Peter, Did you catch Katie’s email? We are **_thrilled_** to have her and Rep. Lauren Underwood join us for a special Q&A this Tuesday at noon ET to talk about running for office! [**Spaces are filling up quickly, RSVP now to secure your seat!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CHOluzTGENt8GBu8uPxeY2v47EcqgxScxoVzdAIyUNw) | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zj-DebuZ2sZAZlRz-kTRITNQD9V_MxKY4jax1Y9DWq8)
---
— Kelly
Kelly Dietrich
Founder and CEO,
National Democratic Training Committee

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Katie Porter** <ndtc@traindemocrats.org>
Date: Tue, Sept 7, 2021
Subject: Join me for a special event with NDTC!
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >
> [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..APcLAsn18edCWJn-lCd-IZABUJepeywAQWcGBnlDQ_Y)
> ---
> Peter, Katie Porter here!
> I am excited to join the NDTC team as an honorary co-chair with my colleagues Reps. Lauren Underwood and Nikema Williams.
> So excited, in fact, that the first thing I asked Kelly when I agreed to be a co-chair was:_‘When do I get to do my own live training?’_
> **And let me tell you, it didn’t take long to make that happen!**
> **[That’s right, I’ll be joining Kelly and Rep. Underwood next Tuesday, September 14 at noon ET for a special Q&A panel on running for office! Follow this link to RSVP for this event.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LMIJX9u4boePUCIcKeWh4SpOK-0i68gZstAvNL7WFvo)**
> [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vLYA7T9h3fcdQt48f4LcwbRDjncQQyIraKDzRxX6XH0)
> ---
> Peter, running for office isn’t easy. I know firsthand the difficulties of running for office, especially as a single working mom.
> But with the help of NDTC’s free resources, and a few tips and tricks from folks like me who’ve been there before, you will be well on your way to winning your next race.
> [**You won’t want to miss this! Click here now to reserve your spot for my special Q &A with Kelly and Rep. Underwood next Tuesday, September 14 at noon ET!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..PakpST-fvnwVD-srYdR0Xjyt9SpUHV_dtzLU3zHp5SE)
> [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4T1MChKqn9PSlS5c3c3nf7_hlftabIPaAukvU7eLX6U)
> ---
> Hope to see you there!
> [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pjNBnqHUoBRtR7nhWCxQoknBCM4jlex-81RCig3H_RI)
> ---
> — Rep. Katie Porter

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Quick email about my September goal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
This year, i'm aiming to be the first candidate to qualify for the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4fb0c25c069946708d0180c6c5a64c40&_e=9P-O3AQIWbaEfWbPTZrG74lsJZuy8BguYL2cuj4yWzXORRtZgWb-zi538uBErmUfYhG2hngaGA9BAiThbQ5o1r2QSiIyVyfeuwO9sKFBSDWxko1m5xkXklBSrJet-bMfQf0zoQ4klXSpFmrRY4KlEFB9xsje_tkDhrG_trZ5eUMZC3NRObuZtOUIs75UY_USDk6h7sCOFKwgah5mkx6nPfoNmV0Rhw63IdEaQfGXI1YGp9A6UXxDSLVrFbHThAAe_JOoi4UmFT_Nohw0-fDA7Jwl0JhS1IK82oNb9CIP69kZbfwn9AL_pSG9d2Cl3F9akOzrYdzWkiP8zooQC5ldKbHB4wxszwWQFwyNdRGs7_1tdYi6Eyta7zGhsSQls-0_aJ5OTpvM-3lHp9EdSVtzBb9MnWNPm-RncTESfkJc28xEocGS7dLwpYnN_mZd8BMRXy1rvMNQG4H1nMPNIh4BvA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4fb0c25c069946708d0180c6c5a64c40&_e=9P-O3AQIWbaEfWbPTZrG74lsJZuy8BguYL2cuj4yWzXORRtZgWb-zi538uBErmUfYhG2hngaGA9BAiThbQ5o1r2QSiIyVyfeuwO9sKFBSDWxko1m5xkXklBSrJet-bMfQf0zoQ4klXSpFmrRY4KlEFB9xsje_tkDhrG_trZ5eUMZC3NRObuZtOUIs75UY_USDk6h7sCOFKwgah5mkx6nPfoNmV0Rhw63IdEaQfGXI1YGp9A6UXxDSLVrFbHThAAeiG-Ndin5c73foNF-l5MJgk2DhgDNGVYv90BPnOZC0Bs68jfGHT13TZkpfId93FJoZkXdkS7U40_bVDJqjKx28VORgi01NpjEWvKJJ8fF1BAfzNzTGoji_QMo0wRzzUtMARUm2Dgck_yz3EWXNP9L7xFsL9JAmBbPupfMtNSxyAOAMzOnZY28uoOcEsqjYzzpvUkrdnJX40-sTW00tN4Bfg%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4fb0c25c069946708d0180c6c5a64c40&_e=9P-O3AQIWbaEfWbPTZrG74lsJZuy8BguYL2cuj4yWzXORRtZgWb-zi538uBErmUfYhG2hngaGA9BAiThbQ5o1r2QSiIyVyfeuwO9sKFBSDWxko1m5xkXklBSrJet-bMfQf0zoQ4klXSpFmrRY4KlEFB9xsje_tkDhrG_trZ5eUMZC3NRObuZtOUIs75UY_USDk6h7sCOFKwgah5mkx6nPfoNmV0Rhw63IdEaQfGXI1YGp9A6UXxDSLVrFbHThAAeuaJmm7bQgx3kG-33FkRqgyyolbCIxgbdR0-_ri4bVortIoNGZiFdu5_fWksJXsMMN8S9AyI2nccqkQ8f4RLNQrjXlWIRkNXCLzcS6RNXFhNkKImRAbZB3sCazQ6pi-1W3KdUMA2Rn1V-ULfZa5AvnA1YwoZq6jKKs0kxvejvpGY73MDjVi7m-5PD3xCnOE7b7juIpBDzslM51NlXvE8VDw%3D%3D)**

This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, **[I sincerely need all of the help I can get. But, with the deadline arriving fast at the end of this month my campaign is still short of hitting the threshold for entry by $74,920](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4fb0c25c069946708d0180c6c5a64c40&_e=9P-O3AQIWbaEfWbPTZrG74lsJZuy8BguYL2cuj4yWzXORRtZgWb-zi538uBErmUfYhG2hngaGA9BAiThbQ5o1r2QSiIyVyfeuwO9sKFBSDWxko1m5xkXklBSrJet-bMfQf0zoQ4klXSpFmrRY4KlEFB9xsje_tkDhrG_trZ5eUMZC3NRObuZtOUIs75UY_USDk6h7sCOFKwgah5mkx6nPfoNmV0Rhw63IdEaQfGXI1YGp9A6UXxDSLVrFbHThAAexVL62rYdz0qRFc5MJRR3D9DAkUJ9tPR7gimDBdPXqHYii3qDFliO5cmvJ1BIYCVX_ZBnpRT6T_wUalezzGNQiwjl1mVazENVDIxSvWQGS-pghleJdhb1lBYRmVktT7SSjlRxc2Y5Q7-EY_BvszaqX1fmqMa1YRq3VhqLx6KX74dzGwhCDFhqRjMmjduIr9qoL5A4vRiGtMjMC_uYonsH7g%3D%3D)**.

If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘**Young Gun’** status this month with a **[contribution of $4 or more](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4fb0c25c069946708d0180c6c5a64c40&_e=9P-O3AQIWbaEfWbPTZrG74lsJZuy8BguYL2cuj4yWzXORRtZgWb-zi538uBErmUfYhG2hngaGA9BAiThbQ5o1r2QSiIyVyfeuwO9sKFBSDWxko1m5xkXklBSrJet-bMfQf0zoQ4klXSpFmrRY4KlEFB9xsje_tkDhrG_trZ5eUMZC3NRObuZtOUIs75UY_USDk6h7sCOFKwgah5mkx6nPfoNmV0Rhw63IdEaQfGXI1YGp9A6UXxDSLVrFbHThAAeQ8R9yqkFyhJ-S7sL3V4mkLQvDB5YRp8GWCdOSO-R5h6Qy5NwiIYCbnIpIX7XO6XvnHsEV7L7RD-uzsXwgpal3Rel50U3cOvhCkMpBPrbVx7_vYdwwuaVNDCTL4tbv0T1RlgCnYT9oZvd8HuGf5AGkjdc3HCj5uGX6mplyozCEBZb-XBa3WHWvleYUmk_1G4CfgESlAtqdNvYfU6JDwBicg%3D%3D)** to my campaign right now.

May I please count on your help right now?

clean_body: This year, i'm aiming to be the first candidate to qualify for the NRCC's "Young Guns" program. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: INDems HQ
subject: [ACTION REQUESTED] Peter
body:
A big week is coming up. On Tuesday, the proposed legislative and Congressional maps will be posted online. Peter read that right: The view of the next 10 years is here and partisan gerrymandering is the tool the Indiana Republicans will try to use to manipulate the lines of their districts in a way that will only benefit them. They want to pick their own voters instead of voters picking their representatives. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35675566/305793064/624230061?refcode=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjNDRkOS04MTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TmVYNykCpq4B-8YTWAwQy5ixaImyy4A19AmZDLA0nRA=) Our political system is so broken that just last week religious leaders of all kinds called on lawmakers to implement a fair and just redistricting process. They even went as far as to criticize the GOP-controlled process that excludes Hoosiers. This is what they had to say: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35675567/305793065/624230061?refcode=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjNDRkOS04MTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TmVYNykCpq4B-8YTWAwQy5ixaImyy4A19AmZDLA0nRA=) Hoosiers are hungry for leaders to end this broken system. In fact, a[ recent study](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35675568/305793066/-4736632?Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjNDRkOS04MTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TmVYNykCpq4B-8YTWAwQy5ixaImyy4A19AmZDLA0nRA=&emci=182687e0-b013-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7cec44d9-8114-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) found that Indiana's legislative maps are [95% more biased](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35675569/305793067/38357101?Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.=Sunday.RedistrictFR.09.12.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjNDRkOS04MTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TmVYNykCpq4B-8YTWAwQy5ixaImyy4A19AmZDLA0nRA=&emci=182687e0-b013-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=7cec44d9-8114-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) toward one party than compared to the rest of the country. Democrats could win about 45-55% of the vote but yet only win about 22% of Congressional seats. And the Republicans could win 60% of the statewide vote and still hold 80% of state senate seats. That is textbook gerrymandering, and it's why Indiana finds itself where it is today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: clean_body: A big week is coming up. On Tuesday, the proposed legislative and Congressional maps will be posted online. Peter read that right: The view of the next 10 years is here and partisan gerrymandering is the tool the Indiana Republicans will try to use to manipulate the lines of their districts in a way that will only benefit them. They want to pick their own voters instead of voters picking their representatives. = Our political system is so broken that just last week religious leaders of all kinds called on lawmakers to implement a fair and just redistricting process. They even went as far as to criticize the GOP-controlled process that excludes Hoosiers. This is what they had to say: = Hoosiers are hungry for leaders to end this broken system. In fact, a found that Indiana's legislative maps are toward one party than compared to the rest of the country. Democrats could win about 45-55% of the vote but yet only win about 22% of Congressional seats. And the Republicans could win 60% of the statewide vote and still hold 80% of state senate seats. That is textbook gerrymandering, and it's why Indiana finds itself where it is today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = The status-quo Indiana Republicans don't want things to change. They want to continue their extreme partisanship and misinformation that's holding Hoosiers back from a better future. These new maps will shape the Hoosier State for a generation - and it's why voters must hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable for manipulating the system behind closed doors with shadowy consultants against the voters and communities they claim to care most about. That's where you become a critical part of this effort. = __Thank you for your support, INDems HQ Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**From: **Eden, Megan, and Jimena <hello@barriertoentrypac.com>
**Subject: **🚨Big merger alert (plus matching gifts)!
**Date: **September 12, 2021 at 11:14 AM ET
**To: **Peter <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter,

**We have an exciting announcement for you all today:_Pay Your Interns_ is now officially merged as a subsidiary PAC to _Barrier to Entry!_**

Many of you already know that these two are sister PACs, founded by the same trifecta of young progressive women seeking to increase equitability and inclusivity in the professional world and in Democratic politics.

While _Pay Your Interns_ will remain a critical individual branch of _Barrier to Entry_ that specifically focuses on eliminating unpaid internships and unethical labor practices, we feel that this unification will further strengthen the overall goal of increasing transparency and accountability when it comes to fair jobs and equal opportunities in the progressive political space.

_Barrier to Entry’s_ mission has always been to dismantle the socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks from getting ahead in professional and political sectors. And now, with _Pay Your Interns_ officially joining us, we hope to ensure that there is both dignity and inclusion in all labor -- including interns, campaign staff, political candidates, and beyond.

**Together, we are stronger. And united, we can build both a government and a business environment that truly reflect ALL people. But we can’t do any of it without you fighting alongside us.**

[**So today, in honor of this newly-established alliance between _Barrier to Entry_ and _Pay Your Interns_ , all donations will be MATCHED \-- but only until MIDNIGHT! Please rush a contribution right away to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT and celebrate this monumental partnership with us clean_body: EXTENDED DEADLINE: The generous donor who made the matching gift proposal below has graciously extended this offer for another 24 hours! | | | = OMG, we can't believe this! The generous donor who made the matching gift proposal below has graciously extended this offer for another 24 hours! Yep, that means until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT , you can STILL have your gift doubled to help us kickoff this exciting merger between our two sister PACs, Barrier to Entry and Pay Your Interns! This opportunity doesn't come often, so please take advantage of it now! But hurry because it will be gone before you know it! = Thanks for everything you do! Barrier To Entry PAC x Pay Your Interns PAC \---------- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ---------- From: Eden, Megan, and Jimena <hello@barriertoentrypac.com> Subject: 🚨Big merger alert (plus matching gifts)! Date: September 12, 2021 at 11:14 AM ET To: Peter <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, We have an exciting announcement for you all today:Pay Your Interns is now officially merged as a subsidiary PAC to Barrier to Entry! Many of you already know that these two are sister PACs, founded by the same trifecta of young progressive women seeking to increase equitability and inclusivity in the professional world and in Democratic politics. While Pay Your Interns will remain a critical individual branch of Barrier to Entry that specifically focuses on eliminating unpaid internships and unethical labor practices, we feel that this unification will further strengthen the overall goal of increasing transparency and accountability when it comes to fair jobs and equal opportunities in the progressive political space. Barrier to Entry’s mission has always been to dismantle the socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks from getting ahead in professional and political sectors. And now, with Pay Your Interns officially joining us, we hope to ensure that there is both dignity and inclusion in all labor -- including interns, campaign staff, political candidates, and beyond. Together, we are stronger. And united, we can build both a government and a business environment that truly reflect ALL people. But we can’t do any of it without you fighting alongside us. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __= __= __= __= __= We can’t wait to see this coalition continue to build momentum, and we hope you’re as pumped up about this merger as we are. Thanks for being a part of this fight with us! Eden, Megan, and Jimena ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. body:
this is no time to stay quiet | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGC-6nCKbsnSVxcVpLg-4gNLDf4F6F2VWnyxZTKyDYF0bdiQqUxKMWQ58H2UIkGwKB17y_a7Qfy9HZPECNl0OUL5va_G3ov13FRyF959d9hWXx2LRbUJm5puAecO0OQfgvpY5fl4aeOZZYUoiQfXCOoJubTiG-csCJwnW8YaSjBYAKGVyDpesbFysgAmGdnRNotSq-4GFTaU32T1FP6lgiPGqqwlPJpT4jIRn1-hjXsAomeg575iFaGPcjp2ArawUz2rlq-zqYjV8Mwp_ntH_8ocITymHoatVUXeASwndFtEPutqSk0ntK-8ODqSqaEvWZPNR6FTNx4mK1Fyrj3A-Gi8/3fa/bLd0ui-3Qv2P7rL7xo8Peg/h0/7mM0USuguMKbSn9KbPBy-kzfQQY88sct-ZfN3YSiyTg)
Derek, last week, a right-wing majority on the Supreme Court abandoned _Roe v. Wade_ by refusing to stop a radical Texas law that banned most abortions.

As you may have heard, the Texas law is one of the most extreme abortion bans ever passed in our country.

Unbelievably, the law lets any person from anywhere in the country sue any Texan who helps someone get access to an abortion.

It’s a disgusting law, and if the Supreme Court refuses to protect _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive freedom, we can’t stay silent.

We believe that _Roe v. Wade_ is the law of the land and that no one has the right to tell someone else what they can or can’t do with their bodies.

clean_body: this is no time to stay quiet | | | Derek, last week, a right-wing majority on the Supreme Court abandoned Roe v. Wade by refusing to stop a radical Texas law that banned most abortions. As you may have heard, the Texas law is one of the most extreme abortion bans ever passed in our country. Unbelievably, the law lets any person from anywhere in the country sue any Texan who helps someone get access to an abortion. It’s a disgusting law, and if the Supreme Court refuses to protect Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom, we can’t stay silent. We believe that Roe v. Wade is the law of the land and that no one has the right to tell someone else what they can or can’t do with their bodies. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: The Next Generation of Internet Connectivity
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Maryland is going to need world-class technology infrastructure if our state is going to attract the very best technology companies and entrepreneurs, and take the lead in high tech industries like biotechnology and cybersecurity. That’s why by the end of his first term as Governor, Peter Franchot will make sure that every Marylander has access to high-speed broadband and 5G connectivity.
TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/SSZ4-HRaJUWAcDlsrPTUHA2]This isn’t just an economic consideration -- this is also a matter of justice for many of our working families who have been frozen out of new opportunities due to lack of access to high-speed internet, especially during the remote work revolution of the past year.
We’re incredibly excited about Peter’s bold plan to build the next generation of internet connectivity, and we’d like to give you an opportunity to let us know directly how you feel about it! By taking our survey, you can let us know more about your experience with remote work in the past year, and you’ll also have the opportunity to share your thoughts with Peter Franchot regarding how 5G connectivity and high-speed internet would make a difference in your life.
Click here to take our quick survey -- it’ll only take a minute! We’re looking to get at least 1,000 responses from our subscribers to achieve representative results that will help us better understand and serve Maryland’s diverse communities under Peter Franchot’s gubernatorial administration. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/SSZ4-HRaJUWAcDlsrPTUHA2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot Digital
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em091321]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: 📎 not asking for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I just launched my emergency September Grassroots Democrats Survey.

---

subject: these past few weeks have been a whirlwind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I wanted to send you a note before the Senate heads back into session this week. I spent our short break in August traveling across Virginia, talking about the work we’ve done on COVID relief and rebuilding our infrastructure.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35692755/305843235/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmM3OTc4Yy1hNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjUE3X89R4doRYLl3E0JXf57iRVR_wFP0LYTf6DgKYc=&emci=4c074522-3314-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=4bc7978c-a414-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I wanted to send you a note before the Senate heads back into session this week. I spent our short break in August traveling across Virginia, talking about the work we’ve done on COVID relief and rebuilding our infrastructure. But the past few weeks have also been a trying time for our country. We’ve seen voting rights under attack across the country -- and extreme weather events fueled by climate change are on the rise. A terrorist attack in Kabul claimed the lives of 13 of our troops withdrawing from Afghanistan. An unconstitutional six week abortion ban in Texas and a complicit Supreme Court threaten to roll back reproductive rights around the country. **And right now, we’re less than ten days away from the start of early voting in Virginia.** Derek, we’ve got some big tasks ahead of us. There’s a lot going on right now, but we can’t lose focus when there is so much at risk for Virginia’s families. This November, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- and in the midterms, we have to hold the Senate. In the Senate, I’ll be working on bringing folks together and investing in our families and rebuilding our infrastructure -- but with everything on the line, I need this grassroots team to keep up the support so we can keep making progress for families across the country. **_[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us keep up the fight, Derek?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35692757/305843237/-363772836?refcode=mw_em_210912_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmM3OTc4Yy1hNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjUE3X89R4doRYLl3E0JXf57iRVR_wFP0LYTf6DgKYc=)_** Thanks, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35692759/305843239/-363772836?refcode=mw_em_210912_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmM3OTc4Yy1hNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjUE3X89R4doRYLl3E0JXf57iRVR_wFP0LYTf6DgKYc=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Republicans are no longer committed to democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Republicans in Congress are no longer committed to democracy. In fact, many of them are doing everything in their power to subvert it. They know the majority of Americans don’t support the hateful, conspiratorial, and authoritarian views that emanate from the undisputed leader of their party, Donald Trump. That’s why the GOP is determined to suppress millions of votes in the midterm elections to cement minority control in the House for the next decade — and perhaps permanently. **It’s a clear and present danger to our country and democracy.** Last week, Texas Governor Greg Abbott signed a disgraceful voter suppression bill into law — in a state that already ranks near the bottom in voter turnout due to the GOP’s endless, anti-democratic assault on voting rights. Abbott’s pushing a false narrative that the voting restrictions will prevent “cheating at the ballot box." That’s GOP code for voter suppression. The law not only bans measures like drive-through polling places and 24-hour voting that make voting easier, but restricts the use of drop-boxes and empowers radical, right-wing poll-watchers. In a state that allows people to publicly carry firearms without so much as a permit. It’s a dangerous form of intimidation. It’s unacceptable. And we have to stop it. Republicans will try to pretend their restrictions are about “making our elections more secure.” We know that isn’t true, and no more than a smokescreen. Is depriving people of water while they wait to vote in long lines in urban areas somehow supposed to improve voter security? None of it passes the smell test; it’s just blatant and cynical discrimination. And it’s up to Senate Democrats to do what is necessary to save our democracy from permanent, authoritarian GOP minority rule. And we need to be loud to let them know how dire this moment is. **[Sign my urgent petition demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and the _For the People Act_ this month. The Senate must act now to protect the sacred right to vote from the GOP’s relentless assault.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35696096/305848001/715337484?contactdata=fwB4FAyJmkWoeCmBJ5%2FpZ%2F9ryXftbBYbRoaFPGasIDCMrD9Hotbvk%2BvysCoUFeyI7Ie%2BOevo%2BYvjFmAxozeAH0%2FFQ2bQFj4LJRg7scGhTNKgKQm%2FifF0HkPPPgCRhtpwzACnXBoJZ48QXANjaANxjxrdL512706nxUHYfc20O%2BY%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210913_AM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210913_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDkxY2I4MS1hNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVcHfhrtROG8Td0SH-SFk-A_uzq3pgQiog-lprIv308=&emci=4c91cb81-a714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=4d91cb81-a714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)** | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35696097/305848002/715337484?contactdata=fwB4FAyJmkWoeCmBJ5%2FpZ%2F9ryXftbBYbRoaFPGasIDCMrD9Hotbvk%2BvysCoUFeyI7Ie%2BOevo%2BYvjFmAxozeAH0%2FFQ2bQFj4LJRg7scGhTNKgKQm%2FifF0HkPPPgCRhtpwzACnXBoJZ48QXANjaANxjxrdL512706nxUHYfc20O%2BY%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210913_AM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20210913_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDkxY2I4MS1hNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVcHfhrtROG8Td0SH-SFk-A_uzq3pgQiog-lprIv308=&emci=4c91cb81-a714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=4d91cb81-a714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)
---
The vast majority of Americans believe every person deserves equal access to the ballot box. It’s one of our fundamental freedoms. The very lifeblood of our democracy.
This is a critical moment. What happens next requires everyone who cares about defending American democracy to make a stand, and do so together. Thanks for joining me in taking action at this critical juncture for our country.
— Adam

clean_body: ... but we’re at risk | | | = | | We can’t blow this one, Derek. After endorsing Glenn Youngkin 3 TIMES, this is Donald Trump’s first shot to get back in the political game since he was thumped in 2020. But, honestly, right now I’m not sure if Democrats understand just how pivotal this race is for our future. Recent polling has shown that this race is virtually tied, with one poll even showing Trump’s hand-picked candidate ahead of Terry McAuliffe! But somehow, we’re still at risk of missing our fundraising benchmarks because folks just aren’t stepping up to support this campaign as we had hoped. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up — let’s do this. name: Mike Johnson
subject: Report cards are due
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Joe Biden’s report card is coming soon. How would you grade him? | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=990ea8ff65f0466c877c8abc5757bca2&_e=uqToKiBUL762qq95bh11cWoZTS7_GuWsxEMgImaQIeHONJ00sovrXhg2Ceo95XID8AVEY503stbvhMUsLNgNuu5s6la9-0p72lC-CPDLKAUG3M26c37Ke07KUH5KLKiZSBdzrz2RyDEBApQL7qiKbZTZDqCUwvP4Qe9pVYF1j00lT45CJLPDsK54ZhPoUAhqpCT0lubEQ5JBEqvKamUr96qMJNLjiaEHDvx4Q7a51yJyDEYvlKuRqfzATdlPoXvfCiCTTxNcyAw17FkcsfmWLtdtv14lHmimkt7JKWvayh_AbmzB0X7gvcVIyN2jSlWa8fq0EEXFEi1FfzHCF5PdE1jg-Ua2gzoXna9N6MzEns6G9BgWTrkzJLMVUccnGcgBdlvll4W94sAQKoV2GRHyFZseVOh7jrG8hRY-6REJJi03tB7uJIiNhMACK1MoOdqXQKCC4n39tCPZ9nOVBoDgDP4qefeCTvqI0Br6_ns5zHk0qj02zyn4HzexqAuYIGW3vTjtwgj_c36zEohg7FBHTUF2TWkJdeMbeO0N1X0yj4jLuJj5AU1S6htyf3dE40RV)

Fellow American,

It’s back to school time! We teach our children and grandchildren to strive for success in the classroom, to work hard, listen, think critically, and respond thoughtfully to questions and criticism. Why don’t we hold our leaders to the same standard as our children?

If there was an actual report card issued on a President, I believe Joe Biden would have easily earned a failing grade on every single measure of importance. name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Coal-impacted communities, take note.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091021 [https://kpef.info]

Dear Friend,

In Pennsylvania, the future of coal communities is personal.

That’s why we’d like to invite you to attend an online event, “Coal Communities Working Group Webinar,” on September 16th, hosted by our partners Appalachian Voices.

Sign up here. [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_fngUws2VQCi7XbzwjaGFVw]

Shortly after taking office in January, President Biden established the Interagency Working Group on Coal and Power Plant Communities and Economic Revitalization, also known as the Coal Communities Working Group.

This group consists of cabinet secretaries and other federal officials and is charged with crafting policy and delivering resources to revitalize the economy in coal-impacted communities like many of ours in PA.

The webinar will dive into updates about the Working Group and explore what’s coming, how grassroots leaders and activists can influence the conversation, and start building our collective vision for coal-impacted communities.

Join us at 6 p.m. ET on September 16th to discuss this pressing topic.

REGISTER TODAY [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_fngUws2VQCi7XbzwjaGFVw]Let’s keep up the fight!

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

We have just one day left to stop the Republican Recall in California. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35703983/305878334/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZDY0YWUxLWJjMTQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mvQlUxKtJQMQZquL-6sWRnjFon_iZaAhpQRG1tMvszM=&emci=a8c0e395-b914-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=10d64ae1-bc14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, **We will keep this short:** Peter—we have just **ONE DAY LEFT** to stop the Republican recall of California Governor Gavin Newsom. Polls show this race is neck-and-neck. If we’re going to win this, it’s going to take a MASSIVE grassroots effort to organize and energize voters in the final hours of the campaign. **[Can you please rush a donation to help us keep California blue before it is too late?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35703984/305878336/949434673?refcode=0913&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZDY0YWUxLWJjMTQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mvQlUxKtJQMQZquL-6sWRnjFon_iZaAhpQRG1tMvszM=)** We could see California end up like Texas, Georgia, and Florida if Democrats don’t step up. So much is at stake. Everything from voting rights to reproductive freedoms could be under attack. **[So, we are asking you today to please rush a donation to help us defeat this recall and protect our progress in the state of California and in our country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35703985/305878337/949434673?refcode=0913&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwZDY0YWUxLWJjMTQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mvQlUxKtJQMQZquL-6sWRnjFon_iZaAhpQRG1tMvszM=)** The Moms for California won't stop fighting to stop the recall until polls close on Tuesday. Thank you! we’re down to the wire. | | **Even one Republican win in 2022 has the power to DESTROY our Democratic majorities and END President Biden’s agenda.** ****[Donate $10 or what you can now to protect our Democratic power in Washington>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35704869/305881698/1582314273?refcode=em_UTC_FR_UnprecedentedInvestments_091321_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OWM2MmVhLWJkMTQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ygt-PhirTdPFnZdRkYg4x3tkgy1fhxJyLg-k24W08nk=)**** | ****[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35704870/305881699/1582314273?refcode=em_UTC_FR_UnprecedentedInvestments_091321_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3OWM2MmVhLWJkMTQtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ygt-PhirTdPFnZdRkYg4x3tkgy1fhxJyLg-k24W08nk=)****

First, Peter, I want to thank you for all the support you’ve given Unite the Country in the last year.
We secured the White House for President Biden and Vice President Harris in 2020, but we can’t rest on our laurels. From focus groups to targeted ads, we’re working overtime to bolster the President’s agenda and protect our Democratic majorities in Congress.
**But we’re facing one of the biggest challenges we’ve seen: a hyper-partisan GOP bankrolled by Trump and his cronies.**
They’re raising millions with only two goals in mind: destroying our Democratic majorities and railroading President Biden’s transformative plans to rebuild our country.

Team, It’s September: kids are back in school, and the Iowa General Assembly will soon be back in session. Across the country and here in Iowa, we continue to deal with the rise in COVID cases due to the Delta variant, as well as attacks on our ability to keep our kids safe, voting rights, and reproductive choice. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Equipping Conservative Leaders
body:
Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztmedisdjm3ila1liha3ggid7m4bv0p2eqpemmbg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddbmelieep1i6lie4pblc9pn9c5je8pm9ob4e9gb4pbjmpj6acj3c6o72pbke3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaomccdkmmqj0slgcoob1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpi6apb7cpg68oh5u)
| |
---
_U.S. Rep. Byron Donalds, Florida_
|
---
Fellow Patriot:

The hardest part of being a freshman conservative member of Congress is knowing who you can trust. After I was elected, I learned quickly that conservatives don’t have a lot of friends in the Swamp.

Oh, there are plenty of lobbyists, consultants, and corporations looking to swap favors for campaign cash. But precious few people in Washington are there for the right reasons.

However, one organization has stood out from all the others for its commitment to conservative principles and its willingness to help new members like me: the Conservative Partnership Institute (CPI).

**[Please support CPI's mission of training, equipping, and uniting conservatives in the fight for America's future!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z82etmeqea4qckrgq01po2lghu213sk1febaijm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)**

Before I was even sworn in as a new Member of Congress, CPI was there for me – shoulder to shoulder, eye to eye. They didn’t just send me some resumes of potential staff members and wish me well. You have to understand: CPI interviews and vets young conservatives all year round to identify and then recommend the best, smartest, and toughest staff.

And CPI’s experienced team helps advise new members. CPI Chairman Jim DeMint and Senior Partner Mark Meadows both served in the House so they know every trick in the book. They know how House leaders rig the process and how conservatives can pick and win fights.

CPI exists to pass all this practical wisdom on to new members, so that every class of new conservatives in the House and Senate is ready to fight for freedom on day one.

Let me give you an example. My friend Ed Corrigan, CPI’s President and CEO, personally helped me evaluate candidates to serve on my congressional staff. Ed knows more about Congress than most congressmen. He helped me separate the show horses from the workhorses and helped me ask the right questions to identify candidates’ strengths and weaknesses. Thanks to Ed's help, I have one of the best teams on Capitol Hill.

**[Nobody else offered me this kind of help. Only CPI did – and they did it better than anyone else could have.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zirlbq6aits157dffftrviu264nrnr9pq7sih068_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)**

Without CPI, new members like me would be susceptible to the hucksters and frauds who corrupt so many politicians. That’s why you’ll find me at CPI’s headquarters several times a week. It's the nerve center for conservatives on Capitol Hill and around Washington and it’s the conservative bunker in the middle of the Swamp.

When I’m at CPI, I know I’m among friends who love our country and are willing to fight for it. We’re there to work together to stop the woke socialists who are trying to tear our country apart.

CPI has it all:

✅ State of the art studios so we can communicate with our constituents back home without the mainstream media’s Fake News filter;

✅ Private meeting rooms where conservative representatives and senators can coordinate our strategy;

✅ Professional training for our interns and staff;

✅ A lifetime of experience, and battle-hardened conservatives who are eager to share it.

I can’t thank CPI enough for everything they’ve done for me and my team. Writing to you on their behalf – asking you to join me in supporting CPI today – is the least I can do for them.

**[Please make a generous, tax-deductible contribution to the Conservative Partnership Institute today.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcha9bcmtg4n3ido2kde5fgq0mfg522vfnbles7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)**

It’s the smartest, toughest, most principled, and most helpful organization in Washington.

**[They need you, and we need them so please give today!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z70jji6hc9i32n7ic2hhbdhptsiopgbhdj1q7dr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
|
---
Byron Donalds
U.S. Representative, Florida

|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel
(202) 595-0282 Fax
[CPI.org](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3hv4r0pn516598epk3dv0kk8amjasknv34l4l4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)
[**DONATE**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdnn4umeh41a85uo9dsk1h2kq9949mfdm77kdgko_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh2bs)
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z10d3f338u05isvlmljsh98jqmpjfhptljhun7g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4climepj0chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Darryn H.
subject: Our upcoming FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hi team --

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is only weeks away. I'm reaching out to our top supporters (you!) because we need to stay on track to hit our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal.

I ran the numbers this morning, and here's what I found in ActBlue:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/leqOIv1keDovP6dhu9TOwG8BsXpt0CvF5hqF-MWmnNc=/AziZvM5vVkL_vZcE-o7EWsxlapFixCWy7vS982fXOgI=?refcode=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alimg&utm_campaign=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alimg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

**[Our average online contribution this month is $23.89. We need at least 78 people to chip in our average donation, or more, before midnight tonight to stay on track for the quarter. Will you be one of them?](https://act.myngp.com/el/leqOIv1keDovP6dhu9TOwG8BsXpt0CvF5hqF-MWmnNc=/AziZvM5vVkL_vZcE-o7EWsxlapFixCWy7vS982fXOgI=?refcode=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[DONATE $23.89](https://act.myngp.com/el/leqOIv1keDovP6dhu9TOwG8BsXpt0CvF5hqF-MWmnNc=/AziZvM5vVkL_vZcE-o7EWsxlapFixCWy7vS982fXOgI=?refcode=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&amount=23.89)
---
[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.myngp.com/el/leqOIv1keDovP6dhu9TOwG8BsXpt0CvF5hqF-MWmnNc=/AziZvM5vVkL_vZcE-o7EWsxlapFixCWy7vS982fXOgI=?refcode=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_albbt2&utm_campaign=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_albbt2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

I'll be honest -- if we plan to hang on to our vulnerable Democratic House majority, we can't miss this end-of-quarter goal.

National Republicans are already flooding vulnerable districts across the country with outside spending. At the same time, GOP politicians at the state level are passing voter suppression laws left and right. And they're gerrymandering districts in their favor to try and take back the House. Karen is fighting back and helping progressive candidates, but we have to help.

Our majority is hanging on by just five seats. But more importantly, our progressive movement for social and economic justice is on the line too.

**[Karen is leaning on this team more than ever before, and it's why I'm sending you emails like this one. We need 78 people reading this email to step up right now. Chip in before midnight tonight to help Karen stay on track »](https://act.myngp.com/el/leqOIv1keDovP6dhu9TOwG8BsXpt0CvF5hqF-MWmnNc=/AziZvM5vVkL_vZcE-o7EWsxlapFixCWy7vS982fXOgI=?refcode=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_210913_mm_fndd_gq_act___dh_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Darryn Harris
Karen Bass for Congress

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.

name: Nick Freitas
subject: You'll want to meet this fighter for liberty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friend, 2020 showed us one thing clearly... our fight is far from over.
**

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: Tyler Harper: Why I'm Running to be Georgia's Next Ag Commissioner
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 13, 2021
---
| TYLER HARPER OP-ED: WHY I'M RUNNING TO BE GEORGIA'S NEXT AGRICULTURE COMMISSIONER
---
| OCILLA - Today, [Townhall.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tRDC_TMXZZ-hpKRW3kLhXqRBj9Hg61cZJrlMUHocDHtU7bXoSDGsrga7EjygBmBybHhMN2bVCW33U66ZOsmOzjMbXZQIk6UiAGuxwJ3MNMYsS-onFgO7Qg7WpzD7k3rCeJaiVPuMQz-OoYUa0jjKAVLSG5rfGb_BL7lVeDgIIzY_f9qVBqskijlLvg2m_oLM-zvZeFQ0l4bArmW7UZs0NIPZkfFtC5NvUQAyXZT7TIcx&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==) published an Op-Ed penned by conservative candidate for Agriculture Commissioner Tyler Harper entitled "Why I'm Running to be Georgia's next Agriculture Commissioner." In it, Tyler discusses his South Georgia roots working on the family farm in Ocilla, his conservative vision for our state, and his bold agenda to take Georgia's number one industry to the next level by fighting for our farmers, our consumers, and our way of life.
Read the full OpEd featured in Townhall below or click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tRDC_TMXZZ-hpKRW3kLhXqRBj9Hg61cZJrlMUHocDHtU7bXoSDGsrga7EjygBmBybHhMN2bVCW33U66ZOsmOzjMbXZQIk6UiAGuxwJ3MNMYsS-onFgO7Qg7WpzD7k3rCeJaiVPuMQz-OoYUa0jjKAVLSG5rfGb_BL7lVeDgIIzY_f9qVBqskijlLvg2m_oLM-zvZeFQ0l4bArmW7UZs0NIPZkfFtC5NvUQAyXZT7TIcx&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==) to share.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tRDC_TMXZZ-hpKRW3kLhXqRBj9Hg61cZJrlMUHocDHtU7bXoSDGsrga7EjygBmBybHhMN2bVCW33U66ZOsmOzjMbXZQIk6UiAGuxwJ3MNMYsS-onFgO7Qg7WpzD7k3rCeJaiVPuMQz-OoYUa0jjKAVLSG5rfGb_BL7lVeDgIIzY_f9qVBqskijlLvg2m_oLM-zvZeFQ0l4bArmW7UZs0NIPZkfFtC5NvUQAyXZT7TIcx&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==)
---
| "Growing up on the family farm in Ocilla, a small town in South Georgia where my family has tilled the soil for seven generations, we learned that agriculture is much more than just a job. For me, my parents, my grandparents, and my community, agriculture has always been a way of life--and I'm proud to carry on that legacy still to this day. I have always been proud of where I come, proud of my deep family roots in our state and in the agricultural industry, and proud of the values that have been instilled in me from an early age, what those of us in rural Georgia like to call farm values.
From a very young age, we were taught the tremendous value of agriculture. We learned that the work we did in the fields was sustaining communities across our state and our country - from their food, to their clothes, to almost every other product consumed. On the farm, through trials and tribulation, we learned the value of a hard day's work. We learned to trust in God. We learned that family was the most important thing we'd ever have.
As business owners, we also learned that big government was never the answer. We saw firsthand that hard work, personal responsibility, integrity and determination would always be the keys to success. But over the years, we also saw the pitfalls of big government, and the dangers of a liberal, progressive agenda with open borders, abortion on demand, attacks on our 2nd Amendment rights.
Today, the war on Georgia families has only gotten worse. Now, liberals are fighting to undermine our elections. Big Tech is working overtime to promote the far Left. And the woke mob is seeking to cancel conservatives at every turn. As Georgia's next Agriculture Commissioner, my top priority will be working to promote our agricultural community - and putting farmers and consumers first. I will build on the Georgia Grown program, strengthen the Right to Farm provision, and work around the clock to extend the reach of our producers to new markets across the state, country, and world. I will proudly lead a team of dedicated professionals at the Department of Agriculture to ensure we are meeting the needs of Georgia's farmers and consumers every day.
I'll work tirelessly to ensure that Georgia farmers are not the victims of unfair trade practices, and I will work with stakeholders to eliminate the burdensome regulations and tariffs that handicap our producers and increase prices on the consumer. I will also prioritize holding China, Mexico, and other predatory nations accountable - to ensure that every Georgia farmer can compete on a level playing field.
At the federal level, I plan to put a strong emphasis on working with federal counterparts to cut red tape and deliver fast relief to struggling farmers in the wake of a disaster. With a renewed partnership with national disaster agencies, we will be able to put more boots on the ground, secure immediate relief funding, and ensure our producers get the aid they need to recover in record time. In addition, I'll fight to ensure the Waters of the United States (WOTUS) regulations from the Obama administration that burdened our family farmers don't return to our state and work hard to prevent tax policies, such as the death tax, that can put an end to the family farm.
I'll also push to make long-term investments in our agriculture community to keep Georgia globally competitive in the long-term. Not only will I partner with schools and community stakeholders to cultivate the next generation of Georgia agriculture through agricultural education, I'll also leverage public and private partnerships to fund rural broadband and other emerging technologies. With an education pipeline in place, supported by modern infrastructure, Georgia's agriculture industry will continue to anchor our state and lead the nation in production.
Finally, as Agriculture Commissioner, I will always fight to defend our conservative values and advance the America First Agenda. I will stand up against radical liberal efforts to open our borders, nationalize our elections, defund the police, pass abortion-on-demand, and outlaw guns. I stand for smaller government, less taxes, and individual liberties--and I'll always fight for those things. As a 7th generation farmer, I know firsthand the challenges that thousands of local and family-owned farms face every day across our state. I know firsthand how the liberal agenda is working to end our way of life for conservatives across every community. This state needs a strong, conservative fighter who will stand up for our agriculture industry and stand up to the radical Left at every turn.
For over 200 years, my family has called Georgia home, instilling those farm values in each generation, working to make our state a better place to live, work, and raise a family. As your Agriculture Commissioner, I will always fight for those values, fight for Georgia's farmers, Georgia's consumers, and our way of life. Simply put, sometimes, it takes a farmer."
---
| | |
---
| Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tdeKhiZIkWWWXRcillknOuFIEGD6HaLVCF1ef3-mGFnl2y_YcFtPTP6r3sy9Nbljv4mzeyeeTUlPd-GH5zvd5FPT-rq9TJ6BSivlLUfW_vJFR8jW7wgCB5o=&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tdeKhiZIkWWWT3RcY31YZdYJzGHCqigo9KLr3rX7JhL9H6VR2zUtv46BYTH_YO2JeqHCkj_QenAhBzVjeAA1p3ZV0agrLU7jddLLZsu2O1FP&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010lHIs_jtKwxMV8oM7qsBSBIy--pW_vy48b0NUze8gnwdPuNUn6j1tdeKhiZIkWWWg4ph-zoxLGjNQjBBvGjdneylrEgEZE_zK4h7FfxgVF8UCnvfYq27yDQODNlD82CMafppdtcQ1vuPVRmOD_oNaV3N6DEWNjaU&c=pGcb0sYNBEvMYaPFIYxk3GsNbQqNz9z5Tu1H3lK1By2Topx_hdkKPA==&ch=TLSc0isnPakDxwPnBPpqac4vTXkOa96jAXWS5TBR-klGslQwsIWwNQ==).

At the federal level, I plan to put a strong emphasis on working with federal counterparts to cut red tape and deliver fast relief to struggling farmers in the wake of a disaster. With a renewed partnership with national disaster agencies, we will be able to put more boots on the ground, secure immediate relief funding, and ensure our producers get the aid they need to recover in record time. In addition, I'll fight to ensure the Waters of the United States (WOTUS) regulations from the Obama administration that burdened our family farmers don't return to our state and work hard to prevent tax policies, such as the death tax, that can put an end to the family farm. I'll also push to make long-term investments in our agriculture community to keep Georgia globally competitive in the long-term. Not only will I partner with schools and community stakeholders to cultivate the next generation of Georgia agriculture through agricultural education, I'll also leverage public and private partnerships to fund rural broadband and other emerging technologies. With an education pipeline in place, supported by modern infrastructure, Georgia's agriculture industry will continue to anchor our state and lead the nation in production. Finally, as Agriculture Commissioner, I will always fight to defend our conservative values and advance the America First Agenda. I will stand up against radical liberal efforts to open our borders, nationalize our elections, defund the police, pass abortion-on-demand, and outlaw guns. I stand for smaller government, less taxes, and individual liberties--and I'll always fight for those things. As a 7th generation farmer, I know firsthand the challenges that thousands of local and family-owned farms face every day across our state. I know firsthand how the liberal agenda is working to end our way of life for conservatives across every community. This state needs a strong, conservative fighter who will stand up for our agriculture industry and stand up to the radical Left at every turn. For over 200 years, my family has called Georgia home, instilling those farm values in each generation, working to make our state a better place to live, work, and raise a family. As your Agriculture Commissioner, I will always fight for those values, fight for Georgia's farmers, Georgia's consumers, and our way of life. Simply put, sometimes, it takes a farmer." | | | | Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on ==, ==, and ==. | | | | | | == | == == == | | Tyler Harper for Georgia | PO Box 798, Ocilla, GA 31774 | | Sent by mailto:press@tylerharperga.com powered by

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Why We Vote No
body:
| | | |
---
Friends,
Tomorrow, **September 14th is the last day to submit your ballot** in the California recall election.
Over the last month I spent my weekends canvassing with activists in Roseville, El Dorado Hills, and Auburn.
I had the privilege of canvassing with my young friend Donovan in Roseville. During my 2018 Congressional campaign, Donovan was my 14-year-old, five foot tall, powerhouse intern. Now, Donovan is a Senior in high school, a basketball superstar, and well over a foot taller than me.
---
| |
---
|
---
He just turned 18. To celebrate his Birthday, he wanted to canvas and then cast the first vote of his life to support Gavin Newsom.
**Don’t forget to submit your ballot by September 14th to Vote No on the Recall. **
So we grabbed clipboards and fliers and hit the streets of Roseville. We spoke to a local union leader who was still undecided about supporting the Governor in the recall. I turned to Donovan and asked him to share why he was out in 100 degree heat on his 18th birthday canvassing for the Governor.
Donovan instinctively threw me a teenage glare for putting him on the spot. But then he took a deep breath, looked at the voter and said, “During the Pandemic the Governor kept me and my friends safe.” He explained what Gavin Newsom had done to reopen his school and keep him healthy. The voter listened, thanked Donovan for knocking on his door and agreed to support the Governor.
---
| |
---
| After canvassing (and a smoothie break), we went to the Placer County Register where Donovan registered to vote. His mom and I watched proudly.
After years of calling voters, volunteering for campaigns, and asking others to safeguard his future, Donovan cast his first vote.
He’s now defending his own future.
---
This weekend, I ran into Lisa and Kathy in Auburn. While Lisa doesn’t agree with every decision the Governor has made, she’s voting no on the recall. “The Governor had courage when I needed him to have courage” Lisa told me.
---
| | On February 16th, 2004, Lisa and Kathy waited in the rain all night to receive a San Francisco marriage licence which then Mayor Gavin Newsom had just made available to same-sex couples. His act of defiance proved a defining moment in the LGBTQ rights movement. For Lisa and Kathy, a “No” vote in the recall safeguards LGBTQ rights.
---
|
---
**Vote no and get your ballot in today. Then reach out to ten friends to remind them to vote too.**
Donovan voted no to safeguard his future. Lisa and Kathy voted no to protect their rights. Why are you voting no on the recall?
In solidarity,
Jessica
---
[Unsubscribe](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3Vxdv5PMU1etxl5HbZ0HUmNQaecUZpgAv91H2GidEznRYvhMjWnwKDay8qoQjlf6-2FcvrMx-2BgD-2Bhw3gDuEenZLPJUlSr1Z0k5xLB3gSx-2BOIlyTEqkr7qlJyTqPYZOW6Qoqk9Gd2Ysd9zdj9WEyHjZxb4W0yzujL1AYMvTGLhcZW27KpylnpboffL8lqiHKYidRPdDszOLD0MeMHsZEGQSqVR2qGHPHFv2qL23TTbi12LohjKl-2Fp5RRy8Pj2XZzbqAE6MZZYyKR4Nbuy2j5PkHQM8Oq4zcxw60swMGxyxgqTWJSAea7t02VoJYb4eFFKSQopZ61NXZYfprXaW6fMA2zkEZEu-2BTPw4BXABU9jhrxdB2gZwZWhpj09c4ZC0gd9fc28xD2KiUHxjLJCSviySwdJvJt-2F8G9F3wWgL-2B3Aiale8yf3EqrYsoZ7scK1wcIGotct-2BT2gqNfP-2FbPWHz7rTD0zdHMEpTjSWOoSQhfHwmDtcv52SWOzQxgtsnbucPZU-2Ft1-2FX3uBNN7hNXPIZnx9grtlDYUjMbFynpGCnV3wXA3eB2RMjMYhgpG0T6Mlmk6KvxOX86k5WfUs2X0WwVCx3aF-2FxdTIjCWO-2Bqx0aQxtYm-2Fl6du0lWiXYO3M6UmtF7kVfxUx2Pi0LWT-2FHsJYJty0Qw2YwCO6hsTiDxPyT5EbM8Iik8uaT48ivSn3Z5gYcvb9wxEz9C6eHK4cdsp9HwYq7xfZsjWCCUhAX4aDxGYThPSGlciA-3D)

subject: More Florida. Less Biden.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fight the Biden tyranny! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b38a5e2e06&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Ranty, dictatorial Biden is back! Apparently, he's trying to distract from his approval rating in the 30s by trying new unconstitutional mandates.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4b5deddab8&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who never ever will hold Biden accountable!**

Been a rough year for the country under Biden.

Inflation over 8% now (not seen since Carter). A shameful and treacherous Afghanistan withdrawal that left Americans behind enemy lines. A crashing economy. Race problems. A humanitarian disaster on the Southern Border.

No wonder Biden wants to change the topic. There is literally nothing going right and he's destroyed everything he's touched.

So his new thing? Killing American businesses and taking on America's governors, like Gov. DeSantis!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=33ee48a617&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden rolled out a slew of measures to boost vaccination rates nationwide, requiring proof of vaccination for federal workers and anyone working at a business with at least 100 employees. If people choose to opt out, they will have to submit to weekly COVID-19 testing, a costly and cumbersome alternative to the free vaccine.

He then turned to take on Gov. DeSantis.

After blasting the nearly 80 million Americans who have not gotten vaccinated, the president turned his ire to GOP governors, particularly Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Texas Gov. Greg Abbott.

“To make matters worse, there are elected officials actively working to undermine the fight against COVID-19," he said. "Instead of encouraging people to get vaccinated and mask up, they’re ordering mobile morgues for the unvaccinated dying from COVID in their communities.

"Right now, local school officials are trying to keep children safe in a pandemic while their governor picks a fight with them and even threatens their salaries or their jobs. Talk about bullying in schools," Biden added.

"If they’ll not help, if these governors won’t help us beat the pandemic, I’ll use my power as president to get them out of the way," he threatened.

“How could we get to the point in this country where you would not let them earn a living because of their choice on the vaccine?” DeSantis said. “I just think that’s fundamentally wrong. I do not believe that people should lose their jobs over this issue, and we will fight that.”_

I agree with Gov. DeSantis!

Since the start, Florida has led the way. While Gov. DeSantis has made the vaccine and monoclonal antibodies widely available- over 90% of Florida's most vulnerable seniors have received the vaccine- Florida has refused to mandate action, either masks or vaccines.

As a result, Florida is booming AND we are in the bottom third of states in terms of new infections, and infections per million residents.

As for Biden? Twitter influencer Comfortably Smug put it best:

**_“Two weeks to slow the spread is now ‘give us your two weeks notice,'"_**

Biden is a decrepit tyrant and all states, including Florida, need to fight him. HARD.
---

| **As usual, Florida- and Gov. DeSantis- is leading the way. But my question is, WHERE'S OUR LEADERS IN CONGRESS???**

As Biden flails from one disaster of his own making to another, he's using this unconstitutional power grab- far from the first of his regime- to distract from his failures.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress speaking up? Why can't they use the power they are given to put a check and balance on this jerk?_

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He won't last the entire term. But we can stop him from his worst offenses.

We must use the power of Congress to investigate and slow down his agenda. Make it grind to a stop. Use parliamentary procedure. and then take back Congress in 2022 and impeach him AND Kamala!

_I'm not an impotent Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done- and keeps doing- is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress first. That's the only way we hold him accountable. Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress too! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a92fee51df&e=afa21b7626)

No more "nice guy" Swampy uniparty politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a42652523f&e=afa21b7626)

Let’s show Joe Biden and the radical Democrats that we won’t be intimidated and we won’t stop working until we’ve defeated their disastrous assault on our Constitutional freedoms - For a better America, Mark McCloskey True conservative for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Team Thompson
subject: Tomorrow is election day!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| |

The countdown until the California election is underway and we wanted to check in and make sure you had all the information you needed if you haven’t cast your ballot yet.

**Polling locations (voting centers) will be open tomorrow from 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM. If you’re voting in person and you’re in line at 8:00 PM, stay in line! If you haven’t mailed in your ballot, you can still do so tomorrow as long as it’s postmarked for September 14th! You can also drop your ballot off at any polling location in the state of California.**
**[Click Here For Voting Information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35707795/305891645/-732795384?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210913_1_1&refcode2=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjU2NmU0ZC1jNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD8VgI_eXvU_QXU51j6je6nVLMHccZkWs511X4k9E1s=&emci=ec7ad496-bd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)**
California is taking part in a recall election to remove Governor Newsom, a process that was put into place 110 years ago to hold corrupt politicians accountable — and today, it’s become an abuse of power. That’s why Mike will be voting NO to recall Governor Newsom.

Thanks to Governor Newsom, we’ve powered through three tragic and devastating fire seasons, we’ve been at the forefront for tackling climate change, and he’s guided us through a deadly pandemic.

Peter, if you haven’t voted already, please make a plan to vote NO tomorrow between 7:00 AM and 8:00 PM at your polling location (or voting center) or mail in your ballot before the post office closes at 5:00 PM. If you have already voted, please be sure to help your family and friends make a plan to vote NO tomorrow!

If you’ve already voted NO and would like to help ensure everyone votes, please find more information below:
* Click here to phone bank: [**_https://www.mobilize.us/grassrootsdemocratslahq/event/401104/_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35707796/305891656/-890337468?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210913_1_1&refcode2=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjU2NmU0ZC1jNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD8VgI_eXvU_QXU51j6je6nVLMHccZkWs511X4k9E1s=&emci=ec7ad496-bd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)
* Click here to canvass: [**_https://docs.google.com/document/d/1F4ml0k0OiFeANlTm64mwz2Ip8rMErJ3ubcZIDUdhubE/edit_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35707798/305891659/-1853831251?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210913_1_1&refcode2=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjU2NmU0ZC1jNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD8VgI_eXvU_QXU51j6je6nVLMHccZkWs511X4k9E1s=&emci=ec7ad496-bd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)
* Click here to find more ways you can help: [**_https://linktr.ee/grassrootsdemhq_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35707799/305891662/1213309363?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210913_1_1&refcode2=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjU2NmU0ZC1jNzE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD8VgI_eXvU_QXU51j6je6nVLMHccZkWs511X4k9E1s=&emci=ec7ad496-bd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=62566e4d-c714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Help me get Biden under control, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Biden is on the road to becoming the worst president in history. Tap or click >>>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e89296c4802bf6d8/0cd14d0b28e4776fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Joe Biden has failed America, and I’m not just talking about the last eight months. For more than forty years as a Senator and Vice President, Joe Biden managed to get on the wrong side of every major issue. **From his shameless character assassination of Clarence Thomas to his widely mocked plan to divide Iraq into multiple nations, Biden gained a well-earned reputation among his colleagues as a loudmouth “know nothing”. ** [**CHIP IN NOW!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e89296c4802bf6d8/2463b3ccbb8e942fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) But at least in the Senate, the damage could be contained. He is now doing untold damage to our country as President of the United States. ✓ His pathetic leadership during the Afghanistan withdrawal cost American lives. ✓ His reckless spending is driving up inflation and burying our country in massive debt. ✓ And his push to poison our children’s minds with hateful ideologies likes Critical Race Theory is a total disgrace. Peter, will you chip in to help WIN BACK THE HOUSE next year and get Biden under control? clean_body: Biden is on the road to becoming the worst president in history. Tap or click >>> Peter, Joe Biden has failed America, and I’m not just talking about the last eight months. For more than forty years as a Senator and Vice President, Joe Biden managed to get on the wrong side of every major issue. From his shameless character assassination of Clarence Thomas to his widely mocked plan to divide Iraq into multiple nations, Biden gained a well-earned reputation among his colleagues as a loudmouth “know nothing”. But at least in the Senate, the damage could be contained. He is now doing untold damage to our country as President of the United States. ✓ His pathetic leadership during the Afghanistan withdrawal cost American lives. ✓ His reckless spending is driving up inflation and burying our country in massive debt. ✓ And his push to poison our children’s minds with hateful ideologies likes Critical Race Theory is a total disgrace. Peter, will you chip in to help WIN BACK THE HOUSE next year and get Biden under control? **OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **Katie Britt criticizes Biden’s vaccine mandate, calls president’s executive action ‘anti-free market overreach’** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=da42758c9a86432f94560d2e364e7d08&_e=DXl074kT5IOVkPn-7sLZbgCDJglL8BLiv5fh-vpIvJfGY8Y908YL4EKNAF16BIWu3FZtrEeVDyIdFqmnPzgO5iuCCSZlGcqPLAs-z7TMBvcujwT7zkZ--Z95UsLsUT3dcjW__Deq0IEJaq9hbMkczewLzcx_inG2CW7BYKUH35UaYYO0VTcJWnhKmuW14OZKWmsaBvzM3RTrmu34a-PwjyWk28yEyErxQdjoS2s1k4BpximjZi_olyRsYrMJyTPWyF7C4L3wKU23gTebbXimp9Q_FW92V84YiX7MV1bzsOl3fAXFLUnX94B-AQ_flvdYYHqtAxJvnh8Gvgl5zSsAFkYRx680UJX3grhOFSFIMsZtTpS6A13MJNm94PIdlyCL76aqGo70BiNsRHdIs5nKff6FL-IG2i1dm5ecyu802fQ%3D) U.S. Senate candidate Katie Britt has been a consistent opponent of pandemic-related government mandates for private employers. The first-time candidate on Thursday slammed President Joe Biden’s recently-announced workplace vaccine mandate. _"Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate is yet another anti-free market overreach. This administration, going around Congress once again, is trying to change the fabric of our nation from being built on individual responsibility to being marred by dependency on big government._ _Forcing businesses to do something against their will tramples the free market principles that have made America great._ _The decision to get vaccinated should be freely made by individuals in consultation with their doctor, not at the unilateral decree of Biden and his bureaucrats._ _As I’ve said before, I chose to get the vaccine after consulting my family’s doctor. But the federal government has no business forcing employers or individuals to do this. It’s that simple."_ [**READ FULL ARTICLE**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=da42758c9a86432f94560d2e364e7d08&_e=DXl074kT5IOVkPn-7sLZbgCDJglL8BLiv5fh-vpIvJfGY8Y908YL4EKNAF16BIWu3FZtrEeVDyIdFqmnPzgO5iuCCSZlGcqPLAs-z7TMBvcujwT7zkZ--Z95UsLsUT3dcjW__Deq0IEJaq9hbMkczewLzcx_inG2CW7BYKUH35UaYYO0VTcJWnhKmuW14OZKsnNo0EwBTR4M_9WMpOGIaAuwnFxi5nsSVECbITJLnv9_aV2saU5Rnexg6jBRtOgwsO2EtKMT8VvCwDAO0tj9F0m1Syir3Iq5OLsxMRPSp6yDylPBi7YrNj53QXYNE5hZjWudHWrCreFQ95pXbEzccghPBdCkoVCDYfEO-Ph1K9QF2856lD5YvRNqwA5khUOT2yaiPj3TWgxfj1h7QXJfVi435VRLwG31J2fkyybHPWs%3D) **KATIE ON IRS BANKING MANDATES** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=da42758c9a86432f94560d2e364e7d08&_e=DXl074kT5IOVkPn-7sLZbvl8LvVYdY0Z1SqZo0hd2Xxd7lWpiLAVApuyFlvjQxaFFWRTekAsKh36gq92g8GE85Ycctpd8evEv063Hc4-IGK8KFulYVfyFrpHlqdqqJ-WhGHwqrtI97DKsmUrCna-L7gTTyE_wv952WLp-P9A4UqGut1OPadpfVwBeikm4r5MvviEu1WMi6s0oS1ULRm5hMkQEYiOi0pOT6lLcVLiaaQtBeh1VUyskuQze68tdzHbR9LP7zGq27bwYbC5gR1Q9Ka4SG3Ta82MNuLbDGRELBB-OeBUFpwx7PYJ2nfEEW8A) This proposal is yet another reason why the Democrats’ FY2022 budget resolution is a total disaster for hardworking families across Alabama and our nation. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Britt criticizes Biden’s vaccine mandate, calls president’s executive action ‘anti-free market overreach’ U.S. Senate candidate Katie Britt has been a consistent opponent of pandemic-related government mandates for private employers. The first-time candidate on Thursday slammed President Joe Biden’s recently-announced workplace vaccine mandate. "Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate is yet another anti-free market overreach. This administration, going around Congress once again, is trying to change the fabric of our nation from being built on individual responsibility to being marred by dependency on big government. Forcing businesses to do something against their will tramples the free market principles that have made America great. The decision to get vaccinated should be freely made by individuals in consultation with their doctor, not at the unilateral decree of Biden and his bureaucrats. As I’ve said before, I chose to get the vaccine after consulting my family’s doctor. But the federal government has no business forcing employers or individuals to do this. It’s that simple." KATIE ON IRS BANKING MANDATES This proposal is yet another reason why the Democrats’ FY2022 budget resolution is a total disaster for hardworking families across Alabama and our nation. It’s a flagrant violation of individual privacy that attempts to skirt the Fourth Amendment and turn the IRS into Big Brother. COLLEGE FOOTBALL BEGINS! Special Message From Baldwin County's Mary Cane Thank you to Baldwin County's Mary Cane for sharing her support of our campaign! "People are ready for a new face... we need Katie Britt as our next Senator." Hear more from Mary on why she's on here: - Katie Britt On Opioid Epidemic Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
