**Our voting rights in Arizona are under serious attack****,** and it's Attorney General Brnovich leading the charge.

In July, the Supreme Court upheld two Arizona voting laws that disproportionately impact underserved communities — and gutted the Voting Rights Act in the process. In court, it was Brnovich who defended _both_ discriminatory measures.

I grew up in the same communities that Republicans like Brnovich are now targetting with their so-called "election security" measures. I know what it's like to be marginalized, and how _important_ having a voice in your government is when you're underserved.

**As the People's Attorney, I will fight to make voting safe, accessible, and free for _everyone_ in Arizona.** Our government is supposed to be _by_ the people and _for_ the people — let's make sure it stays that way.

[**Will you help fight against Republican's voter suppression by supporting my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35708336/305893312/2127152568?refcode=X_091321_VotingRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI2Y2NmYi1jODE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeWP0jZQEKE0pyaM4VbzJTi9svf4Xxc99KOiCr8DpnA=)

Thank you!

I want to hear from you – what issues do you think the U.S. Senate should be pr | Peter I jumped into this critical Georgia Senate race because I believe that ALL people should have the opportunity to pursue the American dream. Unfortunately, what we are witnessing in Washington is Democrats using their Senate majority to play partisan politics, and in doing so - they are ignoring the issues facing our country. Peter that is why I am reaching out to you today. If I am elected to be the next Senator from Georgia, I will be YOUR VOICE in Washington. Official 2021 Senate Priorities Survey It's safe to say the Democrats' politics are frustrating. With record inflation, a crippled economy, and an out-of-control border crisis - our country is facing the consequences of inaction by national politicians. Action must be taken, and I want to hear from YOU on the issues you think the Senate should be prioritizing. The more I hear from you, the more I can work towards making sure your concerns are heard. I look forward to hearing from you. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Official 2021 Senate Priorities Survey | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Derek —

I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

**One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

body:
We are only two days away from our mid-month deadline and I need patriots like you to step up and help!
---
| | | | | | Friend,

We are only two days away from our mid-month deadline and I need patriots like you to step up and help! Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the rest of the far-left are rushing their socialist agenda as quickly as possible, so the coming weeks will be critical.
I was just going over the numbers, and we're still behind from where we want to be. If you can, chip in a small donation so we can get back on track and continue the fight against Pelosi's liberal agenda.
Chip in a donation here: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/we-are-just-two-days-away ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5Yc1FI3QOLidMGDAJGffn1bhi2JPqHx2t8oME-tFma3ZO_T2rmc1_CWV36vD0fRBGAi0GWVQY1noE8uL2TDwbwTn9GkigiGbl5TYlib7maNQ5Sgd9jJH8pboLzJ6oBECdoLY17MQYCX2akYzo1m714j49qPWcqQrUulr5jecl83dCr3mCEMMmQx_tGUka_L5V7k2fvZjV8=&c=2MbneMpBogoxBIIQnQzsPMJ2MVHGpOMAf4fckF3_7bP3yXJh4l8h4g==&ch=OrKeP7MEt5RjHL0NtC_cmFX_tsDFtvxBCOfmmYCfNZd2kZ8Wt5YW2w==)
America deserves leaders that know and respect the everyday people who keep this country running. Pelosi and her band of socialists in the House are completely out of touch, and we can't let them get away with their power-grabs, mandates, and reckless spending.
I want to know you're with me in this fight - show your support before Tuesday night so that we can stay on track!
Just click or tap here to make a donation: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/we-are-just-two-days-away ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-5Yc1FI3QOLidMGDAJGffn1bhi2JPqHx2t8oME-tFma3ZO_T2rmc1_CWV36vD0fRBGAi0GWVQY1noE8uL2TDwbwTn9GkigiGbl5TYlib7maNQ5Sgd9jJH8pboLzJ6oBECdoLY17MQYCX2akYzo1m714j49qPWcqQrUulr5jecl83dCr3mCEMMmQx_tGUka_L5V7k2fvZjV8=&c=2MbneMpBogoxBIIQnQzsPMJ2MVHGpOMAf4fckF3_7bP3yXJh4l8h4g==&ch=OrKeP7MEt5RjHL0NtC_cmFX_tsDFtvxBCOfmmYCfNZd2kZ8Wt5YW2w==)

-Kat Cammack

body:
Your support is critical to help us stay competitive against the National GOP. |

Hey, there — I’m heading back to Washington after being home in Colorado. I got to spend time with Susan and our girls, and I visited 15 counties, covering 1,850 miles. Coloradans across the state made it clear they want to see progress on the challenges they face, whether it’s struggling to get their kids out of poverty or the harm caused by climate change. That’s why I’m ramping up my fight to make the Child Tax Credit expansion — which has already helped one million Colorado kids — permanent and why I’m advocating for a $60 billion investment in our forests and watersheds to combat climate change and create jobs. But my work makes me a target for National Republicans, folks. Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have raised almost $60 million to flip the Senate and they see Colorado as a top target. We don’t have to outraise them, but we do have to keep pace, which is why we set a mid-month goal to make up for our summer slump in fundraising. **So, I’m respectfully asking (Not begging! That’s not my style) you to please make a donation of $10 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before Wednesday’s mid-month deadline. ** [**_Donate by clicking this link today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfb-em-sep2021_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35710915/305904540/-544172133?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20210913_PM1_V2_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk5YTE0NC1kMDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoEUo64k8zDXc9yvXty8idp2M4RY62-f6tnwo5l9lZs=) Thank you and talk soon, Michael _Sent my from my iPhone_ |

name: Jasmine
subject: What I'm hearing from voters in a red part of the district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35711193/305905624/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjVkNzQ2MC1kMTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cjQ3SaTz1RRKsWBgGwdH2_6aDJ2HSaEZ1bogRmleVA=)

| | Last week, I was out knocking doors in Rutherfordton, which sits in the NC-11 half of Rutherford County -- one of the reddest counties in the district. It was a classic late summer Carolina afternoon -- blue skies, sunny but not steamy. One older woman I met took a break from watching a movie to talk on her front stoop. I asked her what issues are most important to her right now and she didn’t miss a beat. “Defeating Cawthorn and protecting our democracy,” she said. “He’s dangerous.” She quickly added “and abortion rights,” describing how incredibly concerned she and her daughter were about the Texas abortion ban. A few hours later, I heard this echoed in Forest City, as I talked with Rutherford Dems in a parking lot as the sun went down. “I’m so angry I could spit nails,” one woman said as we talked about the Texas law and we talked about the urgent need to pass federal legislation protecting the right to choose. On September 18, we’re hosting our next day of action -- we’ll be knocking doors in four counties (COVID safe), hosting a virtual phone bank and postcarding. [**Can you chip in to help fund this important organizing work? clean_body: | = | | Last week, I was out knocking doors in Rutherfordton, which sits in the NC-11 half of Rutherford County -- one of the reddest counties in the district. It was a classic late summer Carolina afternoon -- blue skies, sunny but not steamy. One older woman I met took a break from watching a movie to talk on her front stoop. I asked her what issues are most important to her right now and she didn’t miss a beat. “Defeating Cawthorn and protecting our democracy,” she said. “He’s dangerous.” She quickly added “and abortion rights,” describing how incredibly concerned she and her daughter were about the Texas abortion ban. A few hours later, I heard this echoed in Forest City, as I talked with Rutherford Dems in a parking lot as the sun went down. “I’m so angry I could spit nails,” one woman said as we talked about the Texas law and we talked about the urgent need to pass federal legislation protecting the right to choose. On September 18, we’re hosting our next day of action -- we’ll be knocking doors in four counties (COVID safe), hosting a virtual phone bank and postcarding. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = For too long, places considered “too red” to win, or “too rural” to reach have been neglected by campaigns; but this approach doesn’t translate into winning elections, or creating the kind of change we need in Western NC. That’s why we will be knocking doors in every county across NC-11 before the end of the year -- because this is, hands down, the best way to connect directly with people, to build bridges, and to win. Fellow American

I jumped into this critical Georgia Senate race because I believe that ALL people should have the opportunity to pursue the American dream.

Unfortunately, what we are witnessing in Washington is Democrats using their Senate majority to play partisan politics, and in doing so - _**they are ignoring the issues facing our country.**_

Fellow American that is why I am reaching out to you today. If I am elected to be the next Senator from Georgia, I will be YOUR VOICE in Washington.

**[Fellow American I want to hear from you. It's safe to say the Democrats' politics are frustrating.

With record inflation, a crippled economy, and an out-of-control border crisis - our country is facing the consequences of inaction by national politicians.

Action must be taken, and I want to hear from YOU on the issues you think the Senate should be prioritizing. The more I hear from you, the more I can work towards making sure your concerns are heard.

**[Fellow American please take 30 seconds to respond to the Official Team Herschel 2021 Senate Priorities Survey today!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=665e38343a90480e8ea33d76731af1bd&_e=PRia9fssXso1wlDl_9gCcXGwTJIKyBVTSB90ljpwaG2dTJ1L-AfJ7jRYOdohobjpdFNQDjAVDG3GpnYauywDLKAfXkIUsPbk_dprBZJi_tVYfvSI7xrJoi5qYLdluVisAw-YAtmY8aBXsAqvew2GVCMHSAPyDsHtuajAMr4xCGPQ9sgD7fWWAiC4RjeU4PbtbOuVWCAa1iY8qYV3ujSwe5So_TfKtEQjuLxYxdZOVxsS_3xJKb_FR7R4uAdKC0IS-auP3AXpYi2vtQxYCT2jUEQ9uETnVIa3AGXaTHEhUVqgKTOX8M_3UD2tVF4dKEPX3MRACygcmvIymwRgzm_qjVgYCfBGbWy5DhVl__-K3zyQLwNTLdJlzqSxKkr9h3i-B6eO4axoWpSLv4L8a8IMjt_9oNDoyWEqNqDGxsJXYWLLn27hnqa4SGaa1iUtPU0eP8hPoPKpZUMRsnKm34QwYjTqGrqqEy4Qmd9UF73msVXNBeOINe6ikPJJEIO3hRe242pd3NIuoRqdX7AsgbK9beVHLmXsKL81q5ZZQF8noJQ75h3UyQ2JytjARXDnzITQsR9UVJIPY1s1UrN2wz6OAA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The Democrats’ partisan politics has put Americans on the back burner. I want to hear from you – what issues do you think the U.S. Senate should be pr | Fellow American I jumped into this critical Georgia Senate race because I believe that ALL people should have the opportunity to pursue the American dream. Unfortunately, what we are witnessing in Washington is Democrats using their Senate majority to play partisan politics, and in doing so - they are ignoring the issues facing our country. Fellow American that is why I am reaching out to you today. If I am elected to be the next Senator from Georgia, I will be YOUR VOICE in Washington. Official 2021 Senate Priorities Survey It's safe to say the Democrats' politics are frustrating. With record inflation, a crippled economy, and an out-of-control border crisis - our country is facing the consequences of inaction by national politicians. Action must be taken, and I want to hear from YOU on the issues you think the Senate should be prioritizing. The more I hear from you, the more I can work towards making sure your concerns are heard. I look forward to hearing from you. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Official 2021 Senate Priorities Survey | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of September 13th: NO MANDATES!
body:
| |
---
This week, sign up to hold a protest against unAmerican medical mandates, including Biden’s new vaccine mandate, support Sen. Ted Cruz’ new anti-vaccine passport bill, and fight corrupt medical boards and associations threatening doctors who treat Covid patients with early treatment!

**Action items for this week include:**
* Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22
* National: Support Sen. Cruz’ “No Vaccine Passports Act” S. 1932
* Push back on medical boards threatening doctors who treat Covid
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22
**
If you were on the fence about organizing a protest against unAmerican medical mandates early last week, we hope you’ve decided to fight back and hold a protest after the White House announced its national vaccine mandate! Private companies with 100 or more workers are being forced to require all employees to vaccinate, or face up to a $14,000 fine for each instance of noncompliance! All federal employees are mandated – except the Postal Service, the White House, and Congress and their staffs. **This cannot stand!**

**So, what can you do? Hold a sign waving protest!**** **[**Sign up today!!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zdG9wbWVkaWNhbG1hbmRhdGVzLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ0MzE1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=5O61eObMyOJRi0BxW69XTg)

We have four conference calls between now and 9/22 to help you plan and answer your questions, and a [**how-to guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy1ob3d0by1ndWlkZT9taWQ9NDQzMTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nXu75_6lX_XEnyQPfS_VdQ) that will walk you through the process of organizing, as well as provide templates that you can use for signs and more.
|
---
This past weekend the American people took time to reflect on the tragic events of 20 years ago that forever changed our nation. On Saturday, September 11th, 2021 we remembered the horrific events of September 11th, 2001.

We remember the thousands of innocent lives lost in the attack. We remember the hundreds of brave first responders that lost their lives running towards danger to save lives. We remember the countless families still grieving the loss of a loved one. And we remember the American service members who bravely fought for the next 20 years.

We will never forget what happened on 09/11/2001, or the sacrifices made by heroes on that day and afterward.
|
---
**National: Support Senator Cruz’s “No Vaccine Passport Act” S. 1932
**
As Sen. Cruz says, this is a civil rights issue. After last week’s announcement, we must voice our support for this legislation immediately. So far, there are only two Senators co-sponsoring the bill: Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) and Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-WY).

Every Senator, Republican or Democrat must hear from constituents. Right now, people working in Congress believe that people are happy that Biden is using federal powers to “end the pandemic.” We must let them know that isn’t true!

1. Call your Senators and urge them to sign on as co-sponsors and support the bill. At this point, every US Senator should be co-sponsoring this bill to protect our basic human rights. If you live in Indiana or Wyoming, make sure to thank Sen. Braun and Sen. Lummis for already co-sponsoring when you call their offices.

Your message when you call to everyone else besides Sens. Cruz, Braun, and Lummis, is simply, “I want you to co-sponsor S. 1932, the ‘No Vaccine Passport Act.’ Support basic civil and human rights and support this bill.”

2. [Read the press release and share.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvdmFjY2luZXBhc3Nwb3J0cy1wcmVzc3JlbGVhc2U_bWlkPTQ0MzE1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jpdpcAywhPFiOHE2EqqD1w)
[Retweet Sen. Cruz.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tb2JpbGUudHdpdHRlci5jb20vc2VudGVkY3J1ei9zdGF0dXMvMTM5ODMyODE4MTgwODA1NDI3Mj9sYW5nPWVuJm1pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=2VPzdLBroYFrfh8uF6Is8g)
[Listen to Sen. Cruz on Glenn Beck’s program and retweet.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tb2JpbGUudHdpdHRlci5jb20vdGVkY3J1ei9zdGF0dXMvMTM5ODM2NjIxMzEyNjk5NTk3MD9sYW5nPWVuJm1pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ETKYLUIzQaRLEre9Jg-4AQ)
[Watch Sen. Cruz on Fox and retweet.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tb2JpbGUudHdpdHRlci5jb20vc2VudGVkY3J1ei9zdGF0dXMvMTM5ODM2MjMzMTA2NzkyMDM5Mj9sYW5nPWVuJm1pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=umSjA30SH_nCOkqpHUsg0A)

|
---
Last week, Joe Biden exposed who he really is -- in announcing a vaccine mandate for virtually all Americans, he showed himself as a petty tyrant, seeking to expand his power over the people.

Let us be clear: his vaccine mandate is unconstitutional. He does not have the power to impose vaccine mandates. Not only will we refuse to comply with it, we will do everything in our power to fight it. And we're not alone...

[As MRC explains](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubXJjdHYub3JnL2Jsb2cvZGVzYW50aXMtc2xhbXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1iaWRlbi1tYW5kYXRlcy10aGF0cy1ub3QtbGVhZGVyc2hpcD9taWQ9NDQzMTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=G8R3rr5l8wDuHSV_dVieKQ), Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is having no part of Joe Biden's unconstitutional mandate.
|
---
**Push back on medical boards threatening doctors who treat Covid
**
Recently, there have been multiple certification boards that released statements opposing Covid treatments such as HCQ and Ivermectin. They are threatening to discipline and revoke doctors’ licenses to practice medicine if they prescribe these treatments or if they have concerns about the vaccines and speak about them publicly.

This is disgusting! We must support the doctors who are simply trying to save their patients’ lives. To do this, [we added a section](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NUT1AtTWVkaWNhbC1NYW5kYXRlcy1Db250YWN0LU1lZGljYWwtQm9hcmRzLWFuZC1Bc3NvY2lhdGlvbnMucGRmP21pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=kAZFTe9b_bHKgL3FZn1qoQ) to our **Just Say No how-to guide** that contains all of the information you need to act now, and support these brave doctors.
[HOW TO SUPPORT DOCTORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NUT1AtTWVkaWNhbC1NYW5kYXRlcy1Db250YWN0LU1lZGljYWwtQm9hcmRzLWFuZC1Bc3NvY2lhdGlvbnMucGRmP21pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=h9VRlzT1Y29TF4jQN9JSpw)
|

ICYMI: The great state of Texas took a major step last week in making it easier to vote and harder to cheat! The state legislature passed, and Governor Greg Abbott signed into law, a new election integrity law intended to ensure Texas elections are safe and secure.

[Fox News has a breakdown of what was in the bill](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvdGV4YXMtZWxlY3Rpb24tbGF3LXdoYXQtaXMtaW4taXQ_bWlkPTQ0MzE1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-eMXekA2nGssA-6sTDk19Q), that is now law in the state of Texas.
|
---
**Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do**
September is [National Voter Registration Month](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmFzcy5vcmcvaW5pdGlhdGl2ZXMvbmF0aW9uYWwtdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLW1vbnRoP21pZD00NDMxNSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_S_-oXG7ngdiBgxKmO-ymg) and [National Voter Registration Day](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU2LWVmYWE2MTAyNTYyMjRjZTBiYjkyNmUyYjRhMWM2OGU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uYXRpb25hbHZvdGVycmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uZGF5Lm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ0MzE1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=vhNrDMaH7tDGlt279ZLRtg) is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like how to register people to vote, state laws, and more.
|

clean_body: | | This week, sign up to hold a protest against unAmerican medical mandates, including Biden’s new vaccine mandate, support Sen. Ted Cruz’ new anti-vaccine passport bill, and fight corrupt medical boards and associations threatening doctors who treat Covid patients with early treatment! Action items for this week include: Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22 National: Support Sen. Cruz’ “No Vaccine Passports Act” S. 1932 Push back on medical boards threatening doctors who treat Covid Reminders and other sign up forms See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22 If you were on the fence about organizing a protest against unAmerican medical mandates early last week, we hope you’ve decided to fight back and hold a protest after the White House announced its national vaccine mandate! Private companies with 100 or more workers are being forced to require all employees to vaccinate, or face up to a $14,000 fine for each instance of noncompliance! All federal employees are mandated – except the Postal Service, the White House, and Congress and their staffs. This cannot stand! So, what can you do? Hold a sign waving protest! We have four conference calls between now and 9/22 to help you plan and answer your questions, and a that will walk you through the process of organizing, as well as provide templates that you can use for signs and more. | This past weekend the American people took time to reflect on the tragic events of 20 years ago that forever changed our nation. On Saturday, September 11th, 2021 we remembered the horrific events of September 11th, 2001. We remember the thousands of innocent lives lost in the attack. We remember the hundreds of brave first responders that lost their lives running towards danger to save lives. We remember the countless families still grieving the loss of a loved one. And we remember the American service members who bravely fought for the next 20 years. We will never forget what happened on 09/11/2001, or the sacrifices made by heroes on that day and afterward. | National: Support Senator Cruz’s “No Vaccine Passport Act” S. 1932 As Sen. Cruz says, this is a civil rights issue. After last week’s announcement, we must voice our support for this legislation immediately. So far, there are only two Senators co-sponsoring the bill: Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) and Sen. Cynthia Lummis (R-WY). Every Senator, Republican or Democrat must hear from constituents. Right now, people working in Congress believe that people are happy that Biden is using federal powers to “end the pandemic.” We must let them know that isn’t true! 1. Call your Senators and urge them to sign on as co-sponsors and support the bill. At this point, every US Senator should be co-sponsoring this bill to protect our basic human rights. If you live in Indiana or Wyoming, make sure to thank Sen. Braun and Sen. Lummis for already co-sponsoring when you call their offices. Your message when you call to everyone else besides Sens. Cruz, Braun, and Lummis, is simply, “I want you to co-sponsor S. 1932, the ‘No Vaccine Passport Act.’ Support basic civil and human rights and support this bill.” 2. | Last week, Joe Biden exposed who he really is -- in announcing a vaccine mandate for virtually all Americans, he showed himself as a petty tyrant, seeking to expand his power over the people. Let us be clear: his vaccine mandate is unconstitutional. He does not have the power to impose vaccine mandates. Not only will we refuse to comply with it, we will do everything in our power to fight it. And we're not alone... , Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is having no part of Joe Biden's unconstitutional mandate. | Push back on medical boards threatening doctors who treat Covid Recently, there have been multiple certification boards that released statements opposing Covid treatments such as HCQ and Ivermectin. They are threatening to discipline and revoke doctors’ licenses to practice medicine if they prescribe these treatments or if they have concerns about the vaccines and speak about them publicly. This is disgusting! We must support the doctors who are simply trying to save their patients’ lives. To do this, to our Just Say No how-to guide that contains all of the information you need to act now, and support these brave doctors. | ICYMI: The great state of Texas took a major step last week in making it easier to vote and harder to cheat! The state legislature passed, and Governor Greg Abbott signed into law, a new election integrity law intended to ensure Texas elections are safe and secure. , that is now law in the state of Texas. | Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do September is and is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like how to register people to vote, state laws, and more. | Friday, September 17th is Constitution Day! Use the resources below (or others you find online) to celebrate our Constitution! | Keep attending the monthly meetings of your local school board! subject: Our answer to why more educators don’t run for office

body:
We’ll make this simple, friend: Access to campaign funding is the only thing stopping so many wonderful, talented, committed teachers from serving in Congress, state legislatures, and local governments.
That’s where we come in. Elect Educators Everywhere serves as a bridge between educator candidates and a nationwide network of grassroots donors, volunteers, and supporters. Will you join our mission to elect educators to elected office by donating whatever you’re able? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries2_e3_new_xx_l1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Our mission is singular: Elect educators to the halls of government.
You and I know that educators make great leaders. They learn quickly, they communicate succinctly, they listen and care, and they are committed to making people’s lives better. That’s what we want in elected leaders, too.
Will you make a contribution now and join us in helping elect more educators to office? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e3q2?refcode=fl_email_fr_welcomeseries2_e3_new_xx_l2]
Thanks for reading and considering a donation today — it means the world to us and to the educators who put themselves out there to run for office.
Now, let’s go win these races.
Team E3
Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

Peter,

If you’re from Long Island, you know just how important small businesses are for our community. But small business is also the lifeblood of America -- and our leaders in Washington are failing us all.

Andrew Garbarino grew up around small businesses. His family’s operations put food on the table. This is personal for him.

After more than a year in lockdown, our businesses are failing. And we are fed up.

name: Giffords.org
subject: 1 min → essential priorities survey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We would love to hear from you!
#

Friend -
Every once in a while, we like to check in with our supporters to make sure that our priorities are aligned.
**So we’re asking for your help with an essential priorities survey. The survey should only take one minute to complete. We’re hoping to get a lot of responses to start the week right — and we would love to hear from you!**
[**Please take a minute to complete our September Priorities Survey and let us know what your top issues are right now. We’ll get right to work analyzing the results, which inform our work.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/sept_priorities_survey/source=em210913-1-15&refcode2=854.3935704.voRmPc?t=1&akid=854%2E3935704%2EvoRmPc)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/sept_priorities_survey/?source=em210913-1-15&refcode2=854.3935704.voRmPc&t=2&akid=854%2E3935704%2EvoRmPc)**
When it comes to preventing gun violence, there’s always work to be done. We are taking meaningful action to help save lives. But we need our supporters’ input to know what YOU want us to focus on.
Thank you for helping us do the work to save lives.
All our best,
\- The team at Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/sept_priorities_survey/?source=em210913-1-15&refcode2=854.3935704.voRmPc&t=3&akid=854%2E3935704%2EvoRmPc)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=854%2E3935704%2EvoRmPc) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: This doesn’t sound like the land of the free

It’s starting to look like all the power in the world wouldn’t be enough to satisfy Democrats. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ff4b1eb22d0b42f590859125910df3b5&_e=G_MjbK77ZiREl11fwMQx9n6HchpyYTah-nJ3k7NrvS9pdbklqxY6otcfywVv8a5uBQb7v4wsFrZ5ou3bgKeLieXGJXAUYBiqIil3p1BdoQ5X3Aw5twmWeiwEs1LiItFQo3z0T6LiqG99iuRUrwpphIKsgSaYNIbwBl6zD7CcxhuyY5yM4-oDGTv2JKy1WfvX1-LjGfOru5b2UKTWb3r9U3Z3wmOWoyqdthbdATArKt106n9y_TSNpYbnT9CJvN3huvDB4e53NzlIsu15_6Goiwy0w_m9uLKOzC9ibOoC35I8ScphzQChtaIEoNCXpvcOJd_ZSFGsLuZWNtYRa0YekJHZ7mER1sPGEEcd73pwJtHt7EdFP54Yq7NZ78TPAGDg59fBiJnO8oIabjvgBSwcGrhLfpkUlKJjqvtaG9Rv_fHmmvv2RrZWccGdnZ69V80Ar5CGTsucisnYR1ZFANOS4g7MVj0vH5e0aGv-OZgoyLs%3D) Peter, It’s starting to look like all the power in the world wouldn’t be enough to satisfy Democrats. _Here’s what we’ve seen from them lately:_
* Political indoctrination in our schools driven by left-wing activists
* Media-driven pandemic paranoia designed to justify never-ending mandates and restrictions
* Shameless efforts to federalize elections and protect the power of politicians

Their end goal is simple: to have unprecedented control over every aspect of our lives from the cradle to the grave. _If you ask us, that sounds more like communist China than it does the land of the free._
**Will you stand up and fight back against the liberal power grab?**[**_Add your name here_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ff4b1eb22d0b42f590859125910df3b5&_e=G_MjbK77ZiREl11fwMQx9n6HchpyYTah-nJ3k7NrvS9pdbklqxY6otcfywVv8a5uBQb7v4wsFrZ5ou3bgKeLieXGJXAUYBiqIil3p1BdoQ5X3Aw5twmWeiwEs1LiItFQo3z0T6LiqG99iuRUrwpphIKsgSaYNIbwBl6zD7CcxhuyY5yM4-oDGTv2JKy1WfvX1-LjGfOru5b2UKTWb3r9U3Z3wmOWoyqdthbdATArKt106n9y_TSNpYbnT9CJvN3hxE4OPQVSkhp08WAR_Y2piB-oO90IYutxJpM3kS7ANSdIqM78DR97VacYY03KWUbHYVWN5iHLjiFQK1T54tBQ5THX9gSOhgDVJWPkHPy-jFXR-6PP4JAt_COZ_BDM-Y5SaglEAv3Sgdlo_rbqcTjwZrzeZDRCuT0P_3LrUxByvjpTTtIs4mBkYxMTewmh4-Y3H1hSK7I5ncVjGMPMTXgrglREgqhUToCMG2wqo-IpFQM%3D) [**STOP THE POWER GRAB: ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=ff4b1eb22d0b42f590859125910df3b5&_e=G_MjbK77ZiREl11fwMQx9n6HchpyYTah-nJ3k7NrvS9pdbklqxY6otcfywVv8a5uBQb7v4wsFrZ5ou3bgKeLieXGJXAUYBiqIil3p1BdoQ5X3Aw5twmWeiwEs1LiItFQo3z0T6LiqG99iuRUrwpphIKsgSaYNIbwBl6zD7CcxhuyY5yM4-oDGTv2JKy1WfvX1-LjGfOru5b2UKTWb3r9U3Z3wmOWoyqdthbdATArKt106n9y_TSNpYbnT9CJvN3hxa0vIe2KSzVpzHLnlqTgA7bBQC4JU-Xe7sgL_OfTmHwyUInIUZeE3K1N3BQ5Gd9v01lB67PzNzr05VmbTbsGiskPZftPnoZuzs8YnOOvQBKzyf5yPJle9nSiX67vjpJ-9Yp6PUVthU_AgSmOzJ1X1zluGmvGyNS2azKylklVMlQnR2XOUvoij4Xx39Ky8acsYI6nx_XFAoVg3ujU0BduTHdccnDzxL5BeSMaXgSGSxc%3D) Peter, the Constitution couldn’t be any more clear: The government is supposed to take orders from we the people –– not the other way around! body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn2bdgs140q41a1kktr2dq2fsuo1vkpqlj7th390_rp22sh2s8i66pj4clhm1or4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmmep70tjledom1d1i6sr6adhmcaqn6tpjmlj34pjic8r78pdhm6qratjnm6qjfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cb666obbd37m9omcc9gm9h3csh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5jtdre2akfc5adpp5njvp0og9ruejeajis54co0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4clhm1or4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zubgs651idtfe1bmeuvc1infuu1guk3nem0decso_rp22sh2s8i66pj4clhm1or4cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztvu4od6hif8verekgjmshmgoafhgmlhss9h3qgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4clhm1or4cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: 425 donations before Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our next FEC deadline is at the end of this month
#

Friend,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to our campaign. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:
**The thing is, our next FEC deadline is at the end of this month. After then, we are legally required to publish our fundraising totals for the past three months.**
This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our big bold coalition’s strength. That's why we set a goal to make sure we have the strongest report possible.
And honestly, we’re a bit behind where we need to be in order to hit that goal by our deadline so we can keep growing our movement demanding a government that works for working people.
But we crunched the numbers, and it looks like we can make up for lost time if we can get 425 more donations in the door by midnight on Wednesday.
**That means I have to ask for your support today. With your help, I know we can get back on track.**
[So, if you’re in a place to donate today, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to put us back on track and bring a big coalition of folks aboard our fight for Pennsylvania’s working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714010/305914901/-353695395?refcode2=7cad7ed8-da14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FkN2VkOC1kYTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlzvwB4RIoSeIZTEoNd4Be2K8PEFC9TTDxUgpTb_3pk=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714011/305914902/-353695395?refcode2=7cad7ed8-da14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FkN2VkOC1kYTE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlzvwB4RIoSeIZTEoNd4Be2K8PEFC9TTDxUgpTb_3pk=)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: ROE V. WADE ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: calling on grassroots Democrats from your state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | There's no denying it: [**Reproductive rights are under attack.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQV~)

_**FIRST:**_ Trump's fringe, far-right Supreme Court allowed Texas to ban abortion after six weeks -- _two weeks after a woman can first discover she 's pregnant. _

_**THEN:**_ At least SIX states across the country rushed to replicate this BARBARIC abortion ban.

_**SO NOW:**_ [**We 're calling on 1,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up and commit to a $3 monthly recurring donation so we can defeat every last anti-choice Republican and elect pro-choice House Democrats all across the country.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs06g_)

It's no secret that elections are expensive -- and, we're being outraised by Republicans determined to defeat our pro-choice Democrats. And if they defeat our House Democrats, these anti-choice Republicans could have the power to flood the benches with right-wing judges and attack reproductive rights on the national stage.

**Our House Democratic Majority is a crucial line of defense against anti-choice Republicans. But we 're facing a razor-thin margin, and our Majority is hanging by a thread. **

[**So we have a critical request: Will you become a Majority Maker today by chipping in a ****monthly recurring****gift to defend pro-choice House Democrats?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-) | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

At this make-or-break moment, you're faced with a critical choice:

\-- You can either sit back, let Trump and his House Republicans demolish our House Majority and lay the groundwork for abortion bans across the country...

**\-- Or you can be one of the 1,000 grassroots Democrats we 're calling on to step up, chip in a recurring $3 gift, and help defend our pro-choice House Democrats.**

Which choice will you make? The fate of our House Majority is hanging in the balance.

| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $5 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBed9~)

| [**Chip in $20 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgPm~)

| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfxw2~ef~)

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: [Survey] I want to hear from you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
One of the most important parts of running a campaign to me is hearing from people on the trail.
#

One of the most important parts of running a campaign to me is hearing from people on the trail.
If we’re going to run a true people-focused campaign, it’s important to listen and get a sense of what’s on folks’ minds. That’s why today I’m reaching out to ask you to take our September issues survey.
**[Will you take our issues survey today to help us get a sense of which issues are most important to you? It’s important to me to hear what you think your senator should be focused on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714384/305915876/1145330319?refcode2=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzUxOTg5NS1kYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTckYfQqoV--s5YhAiZI8YF2VA5IPGdXT5vv0S1_jpI=&emci=bd391420-d214-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714386/305915878/1145330319?refcode2=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzUxOTg5NS1kYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTckYfQqoV--s5YhAiZI8YF2VA5IPGdXT5vv0S1_jpI=&emci=bd391420-d214-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**
North Carolinians are tired of out-of-touch senators who forget about the people they’re meant to serve.
Our families deserve better. They deserve a senator who listens, and I believe that we can get that by running a campaign that speaks to the needs and hopes of people like you.
This will be a campaign rooted in our shared values. But to build a better future together, I need to hear from you.
Surveys like this are a part of that. By checking in from time to time, it allows me to see what’s on people’s minds and how it changes over time.
**[What issues do you want your senator to prioritize? Please take our September survey today to share your thoughts. We’ll be reviewing the results soon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714388/305915880/1145330319?refcode2=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzUxOTg5NS1kYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTckYfQqoV--s5YhAiZI8YF2VA5IPGdXT5vv0S1_jpI=&emci=bd391420-d214-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**
In the Senate, my North Star will always be doing what’s right for North Carolina. Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35714390/305915882/1145330319?refcode2=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210913-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzUxOTg5NS1kYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTckYfQqoV--s5YhAiZI8YF2VA5IPGdXT5vv0S1_jpI=&emci=bd391420-d214-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c3519895-db14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**

* * *

Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts. \- Cheri Beasley * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: "A Get Sh*t Done Democrat"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I just couldn't wait to share these major updates on our race from CNN directly with you:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210913-2625-header&t=1&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)
Peter, you need to see these major updates on our race from CNN:
Just days ago, a MAJOR article dropped about how John is calling on fellow Democrats to ditch the filibuster so we can deliver key pieces of Joe Biden's agenda to working people. The profile detailed how John is running a different kind of grassroots campaign, and how he's running as a **"Get Sh*t Done Democrat."**
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30007?refcode=em20210913-2625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)**
**On top of that, CNN has also consistently rated our race here in Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip in 2022.** Together, we have a rare opportunity to flip this open seat blue and add John Fetterman's voice to our slim Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate — _but as John's Deputy Campaign Manager, I'll be the first to tell you that it will only be possible if we receive a record-breaking number of small-dollar donations through emails like this one._
**According to the records we have on file for you, you** **have yet to make your first donation directly to John's campaign.** __[**_If you can, will you make your first contribution of $5 right now so we can elect John Fetterman — a proud "Get Sh*t Done Democrat" — to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30007?refcode=em20210913-2625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30007?refcode=em20210913-2625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)**
Here's what else this brand new CNN profile on John got right: He's NOT a typical purple-state politician. And he'll sure as hell never base his vote in the Senate on what Mitch McConnell says or thinks.
**John stands firm in his beliefs — just the way he _always_ has.** He's proud to be fighting for legal weed ✅, universal health care, LGBTQIA+ protection under law 🌈, the union way of life, second chances 🙏, racial justice, ending COVID 😷, raising the minimum wage, and beating climate change.
Oh yeah, and Sheetz. _Always Sheetz._
[**_So, Peter, if your budget allows today, will you rush a $5 donation to our campaign so we can get the word out about this incredible press for John, build our statewide organizing program, and reach new John Fetterman supporters via targeted digital ads? Anything helps as we approach our Q3 FEC deadline at the end of this month._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30007?refcode=em20210913-2625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30007?refcode=em20210913-2625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)**
Thanks and have an incredible week, 💙
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210913-2625-footer&t=25&refcode2=2625_434096_keSGYk&akid=2625%2E434096%2EkeSGYk)**

name: John Cranley
subject: The Republicans just proposed new district maps:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time to end partisan gerrymandering in Ohio. | Folks, Our representatives, from Columbus to Congress, are supposed to be the voice of the people. But when districts are gerrymandered to keep incumbents in power, the people lose their voice. The people of Ohio voted _twice_ to end partisan gerrymandering in our state, but far-right Republicans in the legislature are still doing everything they can to rig the redistricting process to favor their side. Columbus Republicans just released their proposed district lines — and they aren’t any fairer than last time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35715153/305919317/-504596133?refcode=ea.c80c77f3-dd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&mc=ea.c80c77f3-dd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBjNzdmMy1kZDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uaFit6dp-pgodwGt3HzCstF74wMxlqJfhGFRHmC2Ug4=&emci=d1432252-d714-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c80c77f3-dd14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22604289)
_The Republicans’ proposal for new district lines._ **_[Folks, I’m committed to a democracy by and for the people. That’s why I’m calling on Republicans in Columbus to do the right thing and pass a bipartisan redistricting map through the legislature. clean_body: It’s time to end partisan gerrymandering in Ohio. | Folks, Our representatives, from Columbus to Congress, are supposed to be the voice of the people. But when districts are gerrymandered to keep incumbents in power, the people lose their voice. The people of Ohio voted twice to end partisan gerrymandering in our state, but far-right Republicans in the legislature are still doing everything they can to rig the redistricting process to favor their side. Columbus Republicans just released their proposed district lines — and they aren’t any fairer than last time. The Republicans’ proposal for new district lines. Right now, Ohio Republicans hold a trifecta of power, with control over both legislative houses and the governorship. We have to ensure that they don’t use that power for their own political gain. While our new process will attempt to make Ohio’s 2021 redistricting more bipartisan, the truth is, Republicans still have far too much control over it. And the commission that could end up drawing our districts is hardly bipartisan: It’s made up of five Republicans and just two Democrats. Republicans even passed an amendment to the budget allowing the GOP to call the shots for any legal challenges to the map. Look – our state government is already facing unprecedented corruption scandals. It’s obvious that powerful Republicans have no problem with taking the low road to hang onto power. Indiana Democrats will join Hoosiers on Wednesday at 1:00 PM EDT and Thursday at 10:00 AM at the Indiana House of Representatives chamber to call on Republicans to quit manipulating the redistricting process against voters. We saw that you support Democrats in your zip code , and we want to make sure you know about the upcoming committee hearings on the proposed legislative and Congressional maps for the next decade. Hoosier Democrats have been delivering for workers and families since President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris took office, and it's because we want to create a better future for all of our state's 92 counties. But in order to achieve this goal, Democrats need every district, every community, and every neighborhood to join us so that we can fulfill our promise to build a better tomorrow for the state we call home. We know voters in your area are ready for a redistricting process that ends a broken system that's done nothing but benefit self-serving politicians and their special interests. The 2021 redistricting session carries consequences like no other, and while Republicans will shove their partisan maps through the General Assembly this fall, it's up to Hoosiers like us to show up and hold them accountable at every possible opportunity. The future of Hoosier families, Indiana, and our nation depend on this effort. Are you with us? Thank you for your support, Indiana Democratic Party [**Join the body:
I wish Election Day were today because if it was, Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate |
Fellow patriot,

I wish Election Day were today because if it was, **Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate**.

How can I be so sure of this? Biden’s **[TANKING APPROVAL NUMBERS](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb99107c3ba943d3bd315a229def675e&_e=Ly2UxgIo32AHUeWZ1aS4BwWRXuM64jZKxYLdjk6RWL2cxGtW0QBmzyQs7hRf_5yE6g0yF-AH4__5256ZvuBb0Cdc8AZc5xguCy2ikKaCDfWkcA21_p4CsmnsA6Ryj14QpAoJfYuuLaeQWmzBqNPRhr3Mhtnsf6mQ19Ehm_JhWrYzYRFG_0v1hFIAtbpNH54d6tfphZOsc3USQ5mkFIvk8e5jYNrHVhXFv2NAZLreK8FJM-L0nOC5CVbw_Ej4kffmqjf9gNo6MtWnXqStylwuVLs7_l0Rh4exnX-3MuSLA1dFBlaEfJdnmQiwtCPZuzrN8Ljl5eRXjeASUgrCUsq7BMIq_hHkdK2ce5OghZoaJvWDdefS5qhoEqXWIziKY6AAH6i5kU4SR6nAKHk7S7I_ZBwTpAJ4X_H9s-3nZ6QsB0BalCooJ1Nf6ATSMkfNdn42EgjIWPfi-7PgUYWcDWFmhw5EIgTUAQYDHng2f8tnJ4k%3D)**. A recent survey among the general electorate showed President Biden with an approval rating of just 43% **down 6% from July**. Among independents, it’s **even worse** at just 36%.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: solve gun crime AND protect our liberties
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
Why is a retired police chief on the cover of the NRA's magazine? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8769%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QQRCjmsyM0xm4MIGRgY0yw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03226%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VMyz5%2bwLDjmR8Rfo856Kw&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend,

_**Why is a retired police chief on the cover of the NRA's magazine? **_

I'll tell you why: because _I've got the simple answer on combating gun violence that doesn't take a single gun away from a law-abiding American..._

__**...and it drives Leftists crazy.**__

My name is James Craig. I'm the former Detroit Police Chief and I'm done waiting on politicians to take action to protect our citizens and hold criminals accountable.
|
---
|
---

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=loNWo4RjYwMNQBd6z3KYjA&sysid=1)

First of all, let's agree: Yes, we do have a public safety crisis. Crime is surging. And our leaders NEED to do something to keep our citizens safe.

But the White House gets the problem all wrong. They love to tell us that we have a "gun problem."

No, we don't. Why do we blame the violence on guns? The blame lies with the criminals!

And if we want to solve the problem, the answer is not to write new gun laws targeting law-abiding gun owners - FAR from it - it's to target _criminals_ by enforcing the laws already on the books.

Let's say this loud and clear: **The Second Amendment is not a problem in need of a solution.**
[** DEFEND THE SECOND AMENDMENT - STAND WITH THE CHIEF**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nD6ckSHYORuGa4HXH9WCEQ&sysid=1)
In fact, giving law-abiding citizens the means to protect themselves is a necessary part of securing public safety in our communities.

I know this from experience!

Unlike most of our politicians, I've spent the past 40 years actually devoting my life to keeping the peace. And I can tell you that the conventional wisdom you hear in the media is all wrong.

**Want to tackle gun crime? The key is to focus on individuals illegally carrying guns.** Doing that, you can reduce the incidents of gun violence, because they're the ones committing the acts of violence.

Criminals are not following the law anyway, so more gun laws don't mean reduced violence!

I can guarantee you right now in Detroit, there are individuals charged with premeditated murder who are back out in the community while they await trial. When we make those arrests, judges let them back out in the community. There's no incentive not to carry a gun. _They'll even joke with our officers: "I'll be out before the end of your shift." It's absolutely disheartening._

Grandstanding politicians love to pass new laws that only law-abiding citizens will follow. They've lost sight of how the laws they write get applied in the real world.

_But real leaders are focused on solutions - solutions that get results._ And that's why I'm speaking out now.

I don’t know about you, but I’ve had enough of politician-speak. It’s what got us into our current public safety crisis, with rising crime and struggling police departments.
[**STAND WITH THE CHIEF**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L1pSTF2N1cU2HG26HzEbpA&sysid=1)
We deserve REAL leadership. Let me introduce myself to you and offer a clear contrast to the kind of failed leadership we’re used to in Michigan.

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

When police aren’t funded, when police aren't supported, it’s the citizens who suffer.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VsYUC2Nz8NuFgKqWebbiHQ&sysid=1)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn_**.

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That’s why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan.**

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, friend. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03221%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2beBYS1StciLVmETwmFG5w&sysid=1)**
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03222%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dvX0n2qAryLdzUf%2b%2bGXChA&sysid=1)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I’m a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**

_**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03223%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rLLoDv%2bdl3AgA7Lb12woXw&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03224%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8n5QevuQQRrivKRVdyPMIw&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03235%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DWCfX9BGPNCw4pUpEAA0tg&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03236%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XhIWcrUNdnQFX4HreKVXjQ&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WP8hBkGHwUiqoK81PdDkfQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: Why is a retired police chief on the cover of the NRA's magazine? | | Friend, Why is a retired police chief on the cover of the NRA's magazine? I'll tell you why: because I've got the simple answer on combating gun violence that doesn't take a single gun away from a law-abiding American... ...and it drives Leftists crazy. My name is James Craig. I'm the former Detroit Police Chief and I'm done waiting on politicians to take action to protect our citizens and hold criminals accountable. | | First of all, let's agree: Yes, we do have a public safety crisis. Crime is surging. And our leaders NEED to do something to keep our citizens safe. But the White House gets the problem all wrong. They love to tell us that we have a "gun problem." No, we don't. Why do we blame the violence on guns? The blame lies with the criminals! And if we want to solve the problem, the answer is not to write new gun laws targeting law-abiding gun owners - FAR from it - it's to target criminals by enforcing the laws already on the books. Let's say this loud and clear: The Second Amendment is not a problem in need of a solution. In fact, giving law-abiding citizens the means to protect themselves is a necessary part of securing public safety in our communities. I know this from experience! Unlike most of our politicians, I've spent the past 40 years actually devoting my life to keeping the peace. And I can tell you that the conventional wisdom you hear in the media is all wrong. Want to tackle gun crime? The key is to focus on individuals illegally carrying guns. Doing that, you can reduce the incidents of gun violence, because they're the ones committing the acts of violence. Criminals are not following the law anyway, so more gun laws don't mean reduced violence! I can guarantee you right now in Detroit, there are individuals charged with premeditated murder who are back out in the community while they await trial. When we make those arrests, judges let them back out in the community. There's no incentive not to carry a gun. They'll even joke with our officers: "I'll be out before the end of your shift." It's absolutely disheartening. Grandstanding politicians love to pass new laws that only law-abiding citizens will follow. They've lost sight of how the laws they write get applied in the real world. But real leaders are focused on solutions - solutions that get results. And that's why I'm speaking out now. I don’t know about you, but I’ve had enough of politician-speak. It’s what got us into our current public safety crisis, with rising crime and struggling police departments. We deserve REAL leadership. Let me introduce myself to you and offer a clear contrast to the kind of failed leadership we’re used to in Michigan. My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, I grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. When police aren’t funded, when police aren't supported, it’s the citizens who suffer. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I've already told you MY position on "Defund the Police!" I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. clean_body: It’s past time Gosar was removed from Congress — and I’m the woman who’s going to replace him. | = | Team — Every day, Paul Gosar does his very best to show that he is unfit to serve as a member of Congress. Remember when we learned that the January 6th Commission plans to request his phone records as part of their investigation into the violent insurrection? | | January 6 committee to ask telecommunications companies to preserve phone records of members of Congress who participated in 'Stop the Steal' rally -CNN | = Now, Paul and several of his traitor pals have written a letter to major telecom companies threatening to “pursue all legal remedies” if their phone records are released. This is unequivocally coercion, obstruction of justice, and all-around unacceptable behavior from anyone, let alone a member of Congress. It’s past time Gosar was removed from Congress — and I’m the woman who’s going to replace him.= | = Our mid-month deadline is just around the corner, but we’re not on track to hit our goal. Here's something you should know about me:

I'm a straight shooter and I'm always going to tell it like it is -- even if that means I have to have a few tough conversations with communities we might usually write off for being "too red" or "too indifferent." No matter your party, voters in the North State appreciate honesty over a guy like LaMalfa who would rather pander to the far-right than fight for us.

**But the biggest challenge we face is making sure voters know I'm the viable Democrat running against him.** That's why I'm talking to everyone, and it's why we're laying the groundwork to run the most ambitious voter contact operation this district has seen.

We're starting with an important group: young people and college students. We're hiring organizers to blanket campuses in CA-01 to grow our volunteer infrastructure. But in order to kick off that effort in earnest, we need your help:

**[I'm setting a goal of raising $35,000 by our Wednesday mid-month deadline to lay the groundwork for our youth organizing program. Can you pitch in $3 today? Your donation would go a long way in helping us meet the mark and bring more young supporters into the fold.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717167/305924792/-109236511?refcode=em-91321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2NhODkzOS1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eza4vmbh4t9B69kCZoh_sd4dwtjzE5KkvzAv7lH3fP4=)**

He understands how important it is to build a strong community and the only way to do that in the world we live in today is to meet folks where they’re at | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717307/305925165/1601672617?refcode=210913-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDhlNDhjOC1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXjWWxo1B7WPIR5reGhOpRk-fohQe-H-7s-I9LWkKbg=) _- Check out what Stewart has been up to in our Navarre Newsletter -_ 👇👇👇👇👇 **Stewart has been meeting Virginians where they’re at!** He understands how important it is to build a strong grassroots movement and the only way to do that in the world we live in today is to meet folks where they’re at! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717308/305925166/1601672617?refcode=210913-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDhlNDhjOC1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXjWWxo1B7WPIR5reGhOpRk-fohQe-H-7s-I9LWkKbg=) **Whether Stewart’s meeting people on a Zoom with the Gloucester County Dems:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717309/305925167/1601672617?refcode=210913-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDhlNDhjOC1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXjWWxo1B7WPIR5reGhOpRk-fohQe-H-7s-I9LWkKbg=)**In person with the King and Queen Democrats:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717310/305925168/1601672617?refcode=210913-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDhlNDhjOC1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXjWWxo1B7WPIR5reGhOpRk-fohQe-H-7s-I9LWkKbg=) **Or somewhere in between with the Fauquier Democrats:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717311/305925169/1601672617?refcode=210913-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDhlNDhjOC1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXjWWxo1B7WPIR5reGhOpRk-fohQe-H-7s-I9LWkKbg=)**Going TO the people is central to what this campaign is all about** Everyday, more and more folks are learning about Stewart and his story and they’ve been incredibly receptive. Peter,

Here is hoping that you had a nice weekend.

Today, as I do every Monday, I was looking over weekend fundraising numbers with my campaign manager and noticed we didn't make as much headway as I hoped we would.

_**Why does this matter to you?**_

Because the House and Senate are barreling toward passing some of the biggest tax increases in history – with only Democrat support - and without giving the American public so much as a month to scrutinize their complete makeover of American society.

**Last week I wrote to you laying out what needed to happen before September 30th to meet our quarterly fundraising goal of $250,000**. Today, I’m writing to update you on where things stand:

* Which leaves me with **$59,526 left** to raise before September 30th

Hi friend,
We are excited to announce that former Congresswoman Katie Hill's organization -- HER Time -- has endorsed our grassroots campaign!
We couldn't be more proud to stand with organizations like HER Time, whose mission is to elect women and young people who will advocate for policies that will create lasting systemic change like **paid family leave, equal pay, and affordable childcare.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717636/305926668/558373307?refcode= X_091321_HerTimeEndorsement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTViZjQ1MS1lNjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRfP3mCFNtup3G755L3SZtVy0wlFfOUUx9dWu5JiXnA=)

We're thrilled to have the support of HER Time as we fight to bring Kirsten's fierce advocacy to Congress -- but we can't do it alone. | | Folks, I’ve got my black and silver on today which could only mean one thing — **the Raiders are back!** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt8RmMiHH_rmhmb_QXuKOypDq1d9p9hdBUhukqOKX9gZdHaCZuK2KEIw33l4ud4VbZbRwgma5dvG_ys295az5LahnOj4yY11KwV9z1TtlqQfG8A2LN-6wf2qaIcyehYcy5p4W0VGgOGruicIzHjSIJycL8G9LnQJRq7bZgPOl2Xy_2sNo5P5_bKVjFW3SHPa_osb0Kl0rVPRglbjMWmoA5MygSzBvJbmycC17FZ3dlpGhEeZypejm5mH3tBihoupTkzHmsJNog6NQ8bx1s8FsVFU2kM0ePA86jXmHKvf1qIesFRMhvH7EworN3u-PfW047NSNePaGhAnhiKjoOrSUfwP55hJG34bHUY9Es2r-_mz3vyQdxJ3Z3ApGFDXZOVLsb/3fa/8Zx7q8DKQ1W4WxcrV2EVjA/h1/-SZcCYtgf3dfYVDJDfrt-rFiFLAdYioeiagr6W84wg4)
_It’s not really much of a secret that I’m a Las Vegas Raiders superfan._ **Today is the first time ever where fans can attend a regular season game in the Raiders’ new home, Allegiant Stadium in La****s Vegas**. And I’m proud to say that folks will be able to safely cheer on their team thanks to the vaccine mandate required for attendance. I can’t tell you how much I’ve missed taking a moment to relax with my family and enjoy football season. Oh, and the snack selection we have at our house in preparation for each game is a definite plus. As a side note, I did some thinking and realized that the Raiders and folks across Nevada share a few things in common:_an emphasis on community, having each other's backs, and that Las Vegas is going to bring home the Lombardi Trophy!_ When I was Chair of the Clark County Commission, we took the Allegiant Stadium project personally and knew that it would come as a huge benefit for Nevada and its residents. Here we are, years later with the stadium fully completed. I firmly believe that this new development is a bright moment in an otherwise tough two years -- and will help us get through the pandemic by encouraging vaccinations, bringing revenue into our state, creating more than 12,000 new jobs, and building a sense of community. As we prepare for kickoff tonight, I’m wishing you and your family a special start to the football season. clean_body: I’ve got my jersey on | | | | | Folks, I’ve got my black and silver on today which could only mean one thing — the Raiders are back! It’s not really much of a secret that I’m a Las Vegas Raiders superfan. Today is the first time ever where fans can attend a regular season game in the Raiders’ new home, Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas. And I’m proud to say that folks will be able to safely cheer on their team thanks to the vaccine mandate required for attendance. I can’t tell you how much I’ve missed taking a moment to relax with my family and enjoy football season. Oh, and the snack selection we have at our house in preparation for each game is a definite plus. As a side note, I did some thinking and realized that the Raiders and folks across Nevada share a few things in common:an emphasis on community, having each other's backs, and that Las Vegas is going to bring home the Lombardi Trophy! When I was Chair of the Clark County Commission, we took the Allegiant Stadium project personally and knew that it would come as a huge benefit for Nevada and its residents. Here we are, years later with the stadium fully completed. I firmly believe that this new development is a bright moment in an otherwise tough two years -- and will help us get through the pandemic by encouraging vaccinations, bringing revenue into our state, creating more than 12,000 new jobs, and building a sense of community. As we prepare for kickoff tonight, I’m wishing you and your family a special start to the football season. Oh, and one last thing... GO RAIDERS! \- Steve | | | | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O.
