subject: Here’s why I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
| | Here’s why I’m worried, Derek.

A recent poll showed Glenn Youngkin beating me by two points. AND later this week is our first debate and the start of early voting.

I’m seriously confused as to why our team isn’t stepping up and donating right now.

_**[This is a BIG week, Derek. Can you donate and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717991/305927350/-2023814932?refcode=20210913.6_TM_9CD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmNhODkzOS1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UTyufFZhyPQ5NjlRL5bGWkxJPGZW7voPCu4cVWJljb4=)**_

Look at the facts.

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Not to mention, media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by **“playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’”**

And now, with _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, **Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.**

Listen, Virginians will start casting their ballots later this week, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

_**[Please contribute anything you can right now — we can’t let Trumpism in America win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35717992/305927351/-2023814932?refcode=20210913.6_TM_9CD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmNhODkzOS1lNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UTyufFZhyPQ5NjlRL5bGWkxJPGZW7voPCu4cVWJljb4=)**_

clean_body: | | | | | Here’s why I’m worried, Derek. A recent poll showed Glenn Youngkin beating me by two points. AND later this week is our first debate and the start of early voting. I’m seriously confused as to why our team isn’t stepping up and donating right now. = Look at the facts. My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Not to mention, media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’” And now, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Listen, Virginians will start casting their ballots later this week, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = Thank you, Terry Sent from my iPhone | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Conor Lamb
subject: It’s time for the Senate to stop stalling and reauthorize protections for abuse victims
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35718993/305930203/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=)

Friend,

The Violence Against Women Act -- a landmark bill first passed in 1994 -- increases enforcement and penalties for domestic abuse, stalking, and sexual assault. It expired in 2018 and it's our responsibility to reauthorize it now to keep victims alive and keep guns out of the hands of abusers.

I did this work as a prosecutor in the Marine Corps, taking on sexual assault in the military, and I know how important it is to get this reauthorization signed into law so that law enforcement and victim services organizations have the tools and resources they need to keep women safe.

**In the House, I voted to pass an updated version of the Violence Against Women Act back in March.**

Now, it sits in the Senate waiting for a vote, and Mitch McConnell is blocking the vote on this critical bill for one reason -- **because he would rather side with the NRA than with sensible gun owners who know guns don't belong in the hands of abusers.**

**[Friend, can I count on you to stand up to the NRA and Senate Republicans and add your name to our petition to call on the Senate to reauthorize VAWA?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35718995/305930207/-792541696?ms=em21_210913_vawa&refcode=em21_210913_vawa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=&emci=dd7a7a5a-ca14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=809359c4-eb14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35718996/305930210/-792541696?ms=em21_210913_vawa&refcode=em21_210913_vawa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=&emci=dd7a7a5a-ca14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=809359c4-eb14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396) This bill is about keeping dangerous weapons out of the hands of violent people, and ensuring women have the resources and the legal backing to keep themselves and their families safe.

It's past time to get this done. **We did our jobs in the House, and now it's time for the Senate to do theirs.**

**[Join me in sending a message to Mitch McConnell, the NRA, and all those who stand in the way of passing this critical legislation -- and tell them to do their jobs by reauthorizing VAWA.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35719002/305930211/-792541696?ms=em21_210913_vawa&refcode=em21_210913_vawa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=&emci=dd7a7a5a-ca14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=809359c4-eb14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18516396)**

Thank you,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35719004/305930214/773704285?recode=em21_210913_vawa&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35719007/305930215/773704285?recode=em21_210913_vawa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkzNTljNC1lYjE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1I5VVt4rEy_Z2zkVzHkiaCzs16hHq3ccCxVQgzBSqI=)

body:
Keep the Momentum Going - Peter, Tomorrow is your last chance to vote to recall Gavin Newsom. I urge everyone to **return your ballots ASAP or go to the polls to RECALL our failed Governor!** But the fight for a brighter future does not end tomorrow. We can’t become complacent...especially not now, with a growing number of Far-Left politicians in Congress working feverishly to remake America in California’s image. We must continue working as hard as possible to make sure America doesn’t follow California’s path of decline. And I’m hoping you’ll help me do just that: | |
---
[**HELP ME**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fd516c75549d40e4ac27f7c78cdee77a&_e=FuGOGrQ9nY_yOK5NhOgBA3MgYak9XvFScDQZPTX4zEQC-WBJbganz1r8Fhxc1xNfysOZh4x71hgA3d2Hmmu_qBJsPtLQHeG2He9kXCQsEbN93R-Xy9g9_5aR7GCvELv2mC2gojvfBPi3VhzJWJKPPqljvvkG-k7JY4VxIimPRtHUkxzlZgAgw4OIEJX9xEhXqGVKAhoHMTCCRNCc9AWSPDdoGgh0szBqBseDe9cnVkkSLno28wu7gI67FrvXsjfysaYYTc7_8i1TwicWOzlhVpc0JKIW6R5Yj5l5RX8wSj3BxvpfL1wV6JiCFrAvHgP6k7t5hv5ZOcvLRi35KwWFH2D7ribfnx9YCy5ENzkwn1xHUFzQtemjANL8JRHHEbUkhMG9lNRYBQbuIv5_Xl0V7eii2MOldChLhKbG_jYrVBpLsl3kr2tmjT0wHKpk-A4Dn34OhoIKMQppCPXCE6uUP6EkI6wU3b-B42TTIn-dTS0%3D)
|
---
Under single-party Democratic rule, California has seen skyrocketing crime rates, rampant homelessness, rolling brown-outs, pension crises, water shortages, inflated cost of living, and so much more.

Gavin Newsom has overseen and accelerated these failures. His recall will send a clear message: **enough is enough**.

I’m running for Congress to make sure America doesn’t follow California’s lead – to make sure the American Dream doesn’t lose its luster as the California Dream sadly has.

And I need your help...

[**Will you step up today and contribute to my campaign so we can take back the House and restore commonsense leadership to this country? Click here >>**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fd516c75549d40e4ac27f7c78cdee77a&_e=FuGOGrQ9nY_yOK5NhOgBA3MgYak9XvFScDQZPTX4zEQC-WBJbganz1r8Fhxc1xNfysOZh4x71hgA3d2Hmmu_qBJsPtLQHeG2He9kXCQsEbN93R-Xy9g9_5aR7GCvELv2mC2gojvfBPi3VhzJWJKPPqljvvkG-k7JY4VxIimPRtHUkxzlZgAgw4OIEJX9xEhXqGVKAhoHMTCCRNCc9AWSPDdoGgh0szBqBseDe9cnVkkSLno28wu7gI67FrvXsjfysaYYTc7_8i1TwicWOzlhVsE3QfTLfhOM8-NXicVUvAfeOZeKvDtj-F6Y-2LagY4xiyuUtUeJXhBE_Oywp4C9r4VM2uLtBJn0NrQa03lj1d5ZGhN8ZbeHK-jy5o0t-4_WxO-tzU11OJXlPN_DvjG-yQwtwAyIqBssCx6eMz4K7RwQgIvS03XJbEB92ToNuoTJbgGI9B45jgqdcQ-s_WlVr1vs1E1eIpaWtlzNClT6Gwo%3D)
|

[**RESTORE COMMENSENSE LEADERSHIP**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fd516c75549d40e4ac27f7c78cdee77a&_e=FuGOGrQ9nY_yOK5NhOgBA3MgYak9XvFScDQZPTX4zEQC-WBJbganz1r8Fhxc1xNfysOZh4x71hgA3d2Hmmu_qBJsPtLQHeG2He9kXCQsEbN93R-Xy9g9_5aR7GCvELv2mC2gojvfBPi3VhzJWJKPPqljvvkG-k7JY4VxIimPRtHUkxzlZgAgw4OIEJX9xEhXqGVKAhoHMTCCRNCc9AWSPDdoGgh0szBqBseDe9cnVkkSLno28wu7gI67FrvXsjfysaYYTc7_8i1TwicWOzlhVo0733S7bVj5_wcrzBqEr2UO6nKXgkVTRZi7P5kCHsJgMcRl8I5tX_5OjHHcmzGKY2xOBdIHe3oioKIEmmTiJ1QeCagZ-K_nz8-GdFwxuS1zjKbuI7jrridCSoSH0c3lJmbkMGZgBY4qtgRGLUMjkrFeknshgy-eRx3o-p1an9O1gshoCGfajCcNZdM_khVE0PfZgjcI5tBALX78MaLzX2k%3D)

As always, I appreciate your time and consideration. **Now, get out there and hold Newsom accountable for his record of failure!**

Sincerely,

Matt

subject: Re: Biden’s Approval Rating

body:
I wish Election Day were today because if it was, Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate |
Fellow patriot,

I wish Election Day were today because if it was, **Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate**.

How can I be so sure of this? Biden’s **[TANKING APPROVAL NUMBERS](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=286688cec7014828b7b5ae35151e9c67&_e=ogDzHrhUW_sC51XnWvXXQmFek8MZS4psn5SzIbwWoVv6MZDFHT-q27iJjtnhvnjZAnvVa3OWgm6QlGHqQW4yk1dFFL6CGnkUQImh67O39FhS5wYskdK6kmvzWwfHm3iBHPYdP-zxr7wuSM_tEobaAgXbmlYl908ItZJcIM-aHzKbSATmJ_TDIHj34JfMNLyaGI0HRiWVRoKjSFiR0wSATvv_2GCBfriXazyZUjQk2eCECnD4su1xEQUkzCT17iLowjhSMe49RmVXGuhCkbDa-tnyV27HSetJ_3fAgVYzFldkDb3v_JrWyU5b4QqAoVUYbCal9bUJNB4iFbBf1u7eJdzehUaMzyZ_EIkX1W_UqnRHR8Oufj1jFFvFiYSrI-dGddMLUMNOPDbNl0v1lSCzilE7paAl3IIsa-iq7ExnYsDYup9yEA5hqM1fbG8EAr2epX23tL9-XdySGfPG8A3DHyNPhjU6zm9uB-EFO7VEbtbgr9l1sc75RUCEQcPe-NMD)**. name: Erica Smith
subject: public numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
On September 30, I am required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised during the third fiscal quarter of the year.
#
Something BIG is coming at the end of September: The Q3 Federal Elections Committee (FEC) fundraising deadline.
**On September 30, I am REQUIRED by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised in the last three months!**
When the fundraising numbers will go public, anyone and everyone will be able to see them. [**_So I wanted to take a moment to explain why making your very first donation of $5 to my campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina is so urgent right now._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14503?refcode=em20210913-435&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)
Once our Q3 fundraising numbers become public information, everyone will be able to access them. The press, our opponents, and the naysayers will all make judgments about the strength of our unapologetic North Carolina campaign. It’s up to me and you — [**_people like you donating to emails like this one_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14503?refcode=em20210913-435&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG) — to show just how much power is in the grassroots.
Remember, unlike a lot of other U.S. Senate campaigns (including our opponents), we don’t have a rolodex of rich and well-connected donors or the blessing of the establishment. **That’s why raising the biggest-possible fundraising haul by September 30 is essential to prove to the Democratic establishment that our campaign has what it takes to win.**
Meanwhile, we can’t forget that we’re also up against the GOP! Donald Trump already endorsed insurrectionist apologist Ted Budd, and we know that’s only the beginning of his involvement. Look, the Republicans will do anything to keep this Senate seat. Already, a GOP super PAC is pumping millions of dollars into this race to keep North Carolina under Republican control.
Finally, let’s be real with ourselves. I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who supports a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All. All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting for these transformative changes. Send me to Washington and I’ll get the job done — and I’d be the first Black woman Senator from the South to serve in the U.S. Senate EVER!
Together we can do this. **After all, CNN rated North Carolina a Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat, proving our campaign is viable and has what it takes to win our primary!** I just REALLY need your help right now to get there...
[**_Is there any chance you can please send your very first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. in North Carolina? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because it’s going to take a LOT of people chipping in a few bucks at time before the EOQ 3 fundraising deadline on September 30._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14503?refcode=em20210913-435&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14503?refcode=em20210913-435&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)**
Thank you, THANK YOU from the bottom of my heart for supporting our scrappy, unapologetic campaign.
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210913-435-footer&t=23&refcode2=435_3698_aydccG&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=435%2E3698%2EaydccG)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Herschel Walker
subject: 34 is part of who I am
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eb5ff377882d455ab890253378e199e1&_e=452PLzkcXRKwPUwnJ6rZX7y_NDeri44oLFpLYVLTqwSiBNFrnUj_-KrpJ0hjpeAoZS2f6ZpA5qjFWt_hEemOeqBuwakRdIhQkRmUWvTzthDshV9kFdAWpYOhpsd0TmEG9M1AIw8fxi3n70SgJSoysnkbVrrPvwWbIfZ26ZK09l5IJERBE2CDjjRMvbg9nvLLicCtf82Y4ucRUNsxVtSbCqi03ojnCmaDQUm1_40pOWL2s6wlCvtdJ95uwIfaE-X9PK1Z1YDsHHJElNwicqu2rdiuyOhidoTrNNtuvJzNwX4rouWn0hq9xn-6Yh2BlqktCx55V6ZYAENpNYf115fZMxjprXga8aGsHw0VSk9xPmYRKuCbWblSgZJ0pLeE3CkIWo8skwLYZ-hWp9StqtnUav-srPirMi-J4_4X1K_GL700M5svazfqVnQUxhca4b7spXkieOSwK4-FtZnlxHIPxQ%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eb5ff377882d455ab890253378e199e1&_e=452PLzkcXRKwPUwnJ6rZX7y_NDeri44oLFpLYVLTqwSiBNFrnUj_-KrpJ0hjpeAoZS2f6ZpA5qjFWt_hEemOeqBuwakRdIhQkRmUWvTzthDshV9kFdAWpYOhpsd0TmEG9M1AIw8fxi3n70SgJSoysnkbVrrPvwWbIfZ26ZK09l5IJERBE2CDjjRMvbg9nvLLicCtf82Y4ucRUNsxVtSbCqi03ojnCmaDQUm1_40pOWL2s6wlCvtdJ95uwIfaE-X91FOsqaFFwBY78668h_4K01Sg6_iuU9K-FWVSTQCpeLHb_6ykYh-Gb9lUgpP73FNctIGVDGubN5i0G8rhx5aGpz9r5BPmHJ1Wfn0SOTDN2k5wo94XQtgxUKwC3ePGWCYQFJp3Mqw2vO_CBLl3hGxKlzy4sGl3oy2Lg-8u546tE8b-dIJf1gxQk2Wa0rqTM6XE2LlD4kadH9lk9hTkQJKmvQ%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eb5ff377882d455ab890253378e199e1&_e=452PLzkcXRKwPUwnJ6rZX7y_NDeri44oLFpLYVLTqwSiBNFrnUj_-KrpJ0hjpeAoZS2f6ZpA5qjFWt_hEemOeqBuwakRdIhQkRmUWvTzthDshV9kFdAWpYOhpsd0TmEG9M1AIw8fxi3n70SgJSoysnkbVrrPvwWbIfZ26ZK09l5IJERBE2CDjjRMvbg9nvLLicCtf82Y4ucRUNsxVtSbCqi03ojnCmaDQUm1_40pOWJgPC6SQgZBAjdk17dAgqVNBoiyDYoioTQwO1akNX4ibBai4XXDFGpxA1dnPWqiv4dhUkFBwcQdYpZo0riuwq8Xj72CDqeMv4HIaMjWcTInXFiuSx3RUO2IF5hiikepeNBLOJuC1XIdjOJ1rw6liJsBAy9hQTFdLDJ08NmxflXDVibAMnYP3j9vzDvgPF4L9mhQkvVzmS3srVSUC03soYKvrZ5aDBK1m4P1QzTMXaXW6vIlD_Gsh1XzcPgy8yElFlA%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrat Majority is hanging by a thread. We only need five seats to take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.

And Democrats in Sacramento have passed unprecedented legislation that makes every single Republican Congressional District in California, including mine, a target. None of our seats are safe.

We were able to fight them off in 2020 and narrowly win this seat, but that was only because we had the support of thousands of grassroots Conservatives like you.

Inflation is skyrocketing, crime is at historic highs, and Americans are still trapped in Afghanistan. Democrat leadership is failing this country and voters know it. That's why the Democrats are using their authority to give themselves a significant step up in 2022. I'm 100% focused on retiring Nancy Pelosi and expanding our map, but we can't do that if we don't have the resources we need to protect this seat. Sincerely, Congressman Darrell Issa | Paid for by Darrell Issa for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: A YUUUUGE endorsement for Finchem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity serves us all! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eaf52f521d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud America First Patriot leading the charge in America’s audit and Election integrity around the country.

**And President Trump just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

>From the very beginning I backed President Trump. From the very beginning I KNEW that Arizona was stolen from President Trump by the conniving Democrats in the coup of the millennium. I paid for the initial hearings out of pocket and I spoke up when others were silent.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e74f05f410&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Look at what President Trump had to say:_

**_“It is my great honor to endorse a true warrior, Representative Mark Finchem, of the Great State of Arizona, for the position of Secretary of State. He is a patriot who has fought for our Country right from his earliest moments in government. Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say. In addition to his incredibly powerful stance on the massive Voter Fraud that took place in the 2020 Presidential Election Scam, he is strong on Crime, Borders, our currently under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Mark will also be fighting hard for further Tax and Regulation Cuts. Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will never let the people of Arizona down!” – President Trump_**

Thank you, President Trump for your endorsement. You are leading the way on restoring election integrity. I am truly honored to be recognized for the hard work I put in and will continue to do to restore the integrity of our elections.

This is huge news. This is not only a validation of all of our good work in Arizona but this is a STRONG statement that the Fake News Media can’t cover up. We have the President on our side in Arizona.

**_And now with President Trump, and your continued support, there is nothing that can stop America’s Audit going NATIONAL._**

This is why I am writing you _urgently_ today. This is a tremendous opportunity to strike a blow to the Radical Left who stole the election in 2020. But to take advantage,_[I need your support now to press the attack.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=75dd08824f&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4424fde3ad&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***JOIN ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP***
In 2022, the Secretary of State Races will be the most critical to watch. Despite the fact that we are about to drop HUGE news from the Maricopa Audit, the good work that we do in Arizona can only be CEMENTED when we have an America First Patriot overseeing the elections, not a Corrupt Leftist like Katie Hobbs!

**_And that is exactly what I will do as Secretary of State in Arizona. I will never let the people of Arizona down!_**

But there are already attacks from all sides, and we _only expect those to increase_!
**Legal attacks, media attacks, political attacks. **At this point, I wake up expecting a new one.

**And now with President Trump validating and joining our movement in Arizona, nothing can stop us.**

[_But I need your help. Donate TODAY to join me and President Trump in restoring election integrity around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5af7f8bcbe&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=efde94cfb6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I am proud to go on record stating that there is more than enough evidence to show clear and convincing fraud in 2020.

**It is our duty to recall the electors and Arizona MUST decertify the 2020 election results.**

_This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. [Join the fight today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6cd5175cbc&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1a5752244a&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f295636c41&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0fd247340d&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=05a8ef720e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=05a8ef720e).

body:
I wish Election Day were today because if it was, Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate |
Fellow patriot,

I wish Election Day were today because if it was, **Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate**.

How can I be so sure of this? Biden’s **[TANKING APPROVAL NUMBERS](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ea0761eb05c6414f9159c484f32737ab&_e=zusMY_Z3NfnsZgqexCjoL5fb6SC3LRuu5hw0F8nWbu_OHOB7x2nIr8CLOKsQAZFuaF1pqJtbBRuiGOPGl8BmUEIiwcNo-GAAI4-gZOH5Q5SvQK5TplRODC99wMoZeim5Piy5J4vfBt5f1OhIwcUBtKlrFQCxEnfjBY0CCuaDzrr8N66k5LGS1zcTj_bL6zifMPPAmGgmhYE5__-3RmDQUymdZdDfg66GApKqOA_t-L03X2i_lyeSGWraInyTJq9GG8jQUTcOV2uosw1ANylQUy35dUAGDcdv_x1r3h_PLKIGiCzR2_MDkwkmmuBVDZsq3Lvx7M0CkYnek2kNGOAv7dafpWdAxYH1dUnJuLk8waVhT3wkCMwHz5a2Nmcwr6_KZpPlt1ANzQy5G52FvhndNYCQZtiOjwUEHBnniKvLI8QobKunx2-qUOOnB2Q-GAFiwqsta3cSB0rsW_z6jonnh-XiWq6pWXt4CGFenQQgmpg%3D)**. Right now, they’re at the lowest level of his presidency.

A recent survey among the general electorate showed President Biden with an approval rating of just 43% **down 6% from July**. Among independents, it’s **even worse** at just 36%.

We’re curious to know how you would rate President Biden’s performance following his botched pullout of Afghanistan. **[Would you take 20 seconds to let us know right now?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ea0761eb05c6414f9159c484f32737ab&_e=zusMY_Z3NfnsZgqexCjoL5fb6SC3LRuu5hw0F8nWbu_OHOB7x2nIr8CLOKsQAZFuaF1pqJtbBRuiGOPGl8BmUEIiwcNo-GAAI4-gZOH5Q5SvQK5TplRODC99wMoZeim5Piy5J4vfBt5f1OhIwcUBtKlrFQCxEnfjBY0CCuaDzrr8N66k5LGS1zcTj_bL6zifMPPAmGgmhYE5__-3RmDQUymdZdDfg66GApKqOA_t-L03X2i_lyeSGWraInyTJq9GG8jQUTcOV2uosw1ANylQUxqQ3MyryF69nFz5SEFaF_AiVsP87HiJrbLG6Vdg-VVASnBI5BRXEW3hAEIC0szfsaiWs_jfNhfeP9XgWD_rcdqGnKBZYCBO5QksY-w_biHhzSZ-KAAzlkYfsmqeY6pZfEOrnQy7TuuI10__jAwRapn5FHWZPqi2Pd0k_BOUsbR6FKytjQt-RWPK_KZHxc1QVynVU_qFXWEoT0Fht594rkY%3D)**

Thanks for taking the time to let us know what you think of President Biden’s performance today.

Subject: I won’t beg, but I have a respectful request
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Hey, there —
I’m heading back to Washington after being home in Colorado. I got to spend time with Susan and our girls, and I visited 15 counties, covering 1,850 miles.
Coloradans across the state made it clear they want to see progress on the challenges they face, whether it’s struggling to get their kids out of poverty or the harm caused by climate change. That’s why I’m ramping up my fight to make the Child Tax Credit expansion — which has already helped one million Colorado kids — permanent and why I’m advocating for a $60 billion investment in our forests and watersheds to combat climate change and create jobs. But my work makes me a target for National Republicans, folks.
Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have raised almost $60 million to flip the Senate and they see Colorado as a top target. We don’t have to outraise them, but we do have to keep pace, which is why we set a mid-month goal to make up for our summer slump in fundraising.
**So, I’m respectfully asking (Not begging! That’s not my style) you to please make a donation of $10 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before Wednesday’s mid-month deadline. **
[**_Donate by clicking this link today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfb-em-sep2021_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35720638/305945085/-544172133?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20210913_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2E5YjQwMi1mNDE0LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IJzir9NpNZobxiUMvOm9YofFw5Ypo-YkMAh3JD0Gwx4=)
Thank you and talk soon,
Michael

name: Our Revolution
subject: what Bernie and our movement has been working toward since 2016
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| **Five years ago,** Bernie Sanders founded Our Revolution to take on big money in politics by building power for popular progressive ideas that can transform America, empower voters, and invest in working people.

**Today,** robust Our Revolution groups all over America have built overwhelming support for Bernie's budget — the most significant investment in working people in generations. Our movement has been so successful that President Biden is onboard, meaning that our policy preferences are winning the war of ideas inside the Democratic Party.

**However,** corporate lobbyists are now fighting hard to weaken these historic investments in working families, the ability to negotiate lower drug prices, concrete steps to address the climate crisis, and Bernie's plan to pay for it by making the economic elite chip in their fair share.

[Chip in here to help Our Revolution organize and fight back against corporate lobbyists!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=8&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

Our Revolution has generated national news coverage by organizing **"Revolution Recess" rallies all over the country** in front of corporate Democrats' offices — we've gone after the so-called "Problem Solvers" and "Blue Dogs" like Reps. Josh Gottheimer and Stephanie Murphy,- and just yesterday we launched an ad targeting the influential Ways and Means Chairman, Richard Neal.

[NOW IS THE TIME to defeat the elite and pass the most transformational piece of legislation since the New Deal. Can we count on you to pitch in $10 to help us pass Bernie's budget by overcoming corporate Democrats and the lobbyists they essentially report to?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=9&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU) _If you’ve stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=10&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=12&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=13&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)
---
| [CHIP IN $200 NOW »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=14&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)
---
| [CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=15&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)
---
Our grassroots power and ability to win the war of ideas against corporate Democrats have big money scared.

We know that the corporate class will spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat our people-powered movement and protect their pocketbooks — **but we've got something too: a voice and a vote, and we're in this to win.**

We've held dozens of events in support of Bernie's bill across the country over the last few weeks, and with your help, we can double these efforts.

Because we are strategically applying significant pressure on critical figures like Gottheimer, we're getting results — Gottheimer and his gang failed to block Bernie's budget in its first test. Now we’re doubling down on doing the grassroots organizing necessary to win the battle over the budget.

[Corporate lobbyists are going all out to protect big oil and gut Bernie's bill. Pitch in right now to help us fight back and get Bernie's budget over the finish line!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=16&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

When we organize, WE WIN!

Our Revolution
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_0921&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11?t=17&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

* * *

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/21-member-footer&amount=5&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11&recurring=true&amount=20?t=1&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

**Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power.

[Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2021 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $10 or more a month!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/21-member-footer&amount=5&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11&recurring=true&amount=20?t=2&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

| [GIVE MONTHLY](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/21-member-footer&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_FR_NTL_210913_1_11&recurring=true?t=3&refcode2=2009_5885482_BPm4XU&akid=2009%2E5885482%2EBPm4XU)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Ignore the Naysayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
*_Join me on Election Night[ in Lincoln](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooLe7PWS5KSoZnqeFwdZXpHnNxmTVIawWk-TI7uNbIYfw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=1)_ Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Ignore the Naysayers](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorMxYx-v20meAolB8UKME1f4jJ0DS5zt39_6cZI333Izw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=2) Newsom says surviving the Recall will give him a “mandate.” Make no mistake, he means a mandate for more mandates. That’s why getting out the vote is a matter of the highest urgency. You can find your polling place [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=zxJBdFO2LZRu4lDamvUPFhwBA-ts7btnIExY3uyIgX7S2kGJl6tJ6Rr173WxZ9kj&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=3). We’ve defied the odds every step of the way. We’ve overcome every obstacle thrown in our path. In these final 30 hours, let’s ignore the naysayers, vote YES, and reclaim our government. Whatever happens tomorrow, I am so proud of everyone who made the Recall a reality. You have built a true movement. You have shown what politics at its best can be. You have given us hope for California’s future. Whatever happens tomorrow, we’re just getting started. [Support our Election Day GOTV](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=4) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42TaUsLxLalHnezPRcblZl5N83t78LUvTDe_ynbcyz85ATeJpa_ccC_A4BuXsVF3O8Rg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_13_final&n=6)

Apologies for dropping into your inbox again, but I just had to reach out. I’m closing in on my fundraising deadline – and I have some bad news. **As of 4 pm, I’m falling short of our goal. So I'm coming to you personally, Derek:** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIa3YmTik53TxtyOnp7sTWdSTQXEEz0ywEh90XiSh790sjc0sH28NtuiV_nTKsxtkb-SmgDK_x57WWNrkS1QxhwWtGemK6qSEDmczs1NX9ScWcYbS68_hV_h__jFcxXfl2qUSOvnj1-Tq4iPpC_626DP4rhJALa49TlgBWs_FE3jQHujsRJ4115yvTrU717MrYL7fSLNHXrYisIj2mzuZoOEXRiPAqlPRjB8X5bx9iDmzCZOXhi-h0pcYItXbLL90SUW9vft2Ls-JOg4b3478cgw/3fa/pH5a_wDlSJCIGw_qQ9TNlg/h1/eywtXoXvulF4eaKCt3gZ9CS48mlgtk9NzJBDDOR9ayM) We have a real chance to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority, but Marco Rubio is already attacking me. clean_body: We are falling short of our fundraising goal. | | | Apologies for dropping into your inbox again, but I just had to reach out. I’m closing in on my fundraising deadline – and I have some bad news. As of 4 pm, I’m falling short of our goal. So I'm coming to you personally, Derek: We have a real chance to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority, but Marco Rubio is already attacking me. And with Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups likely to pour millions into Florida to prop up Marco Rubio, I must hit my goal. Your support humbles me, Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . Republicans only need **FIVE** seats to retake our Democratic Majority.

subject: Do you support Biden's vaccine mandates?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Yesterday, we saw shocking news that Biden is forcing unconstitutional vaccine mandates. Tell us what you think! | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=505d10761e&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and _**we want to hear from you.**_

**Do you support Joe Biden's extreme unconstitutional vaccine mandate? [Answer Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=79e72ba8c2&e=1050d051da)**

| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0916436bb6&e=1050d051da)
---
| 15 days to slow the spread turned into 18 months and counting, and now Democrats in Washington want to go even further.

_**Next on Biden's agenda: Use the full power of the federal government to force private businesses to vaccinate employees.**_

If they don't comply, they will face massive fines. This is an unprecedented overreach by President Biden that will result in**labor shortages and irreparable damage to small businesses.**

**Joe Biden's message yesterday was clear: If you don't get the vaccine, you shouldn't be allowed to have a job.**

We cannot let America go down this road. This is unconstitutional and against _the American ideals of personal freedom and liberty._
---

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: Team AOC
subject: A necessary break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner over the last few weeks because we understood the importance of meeting the moment and helping provide relief to our communities in whatever ways we could.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210913-2507-header&t=1&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)
For the past few weeks, we’ve taken a necessary break from our planned campaign operations.
First, after Texas passed an anti-abortion law effectively unpending Roe v. Wade, we started a fundraising effort to support abortion funds in the state helping patients access safe care — and together we raised over $300,000.
Then, after disastrous flooding hit New York from Hurricane Ida, our campaign mobilized to help our neighbors recover. In the past week, Alexandria met with impacted families and small businesses to learn about what they needed, we recruited over 500 volunteers to send check-in texts, we fundraised for organizations doing relief work on the ground, and we organized door-to-door canvasses to distribute resources on how to receive disaster grants.
**We did this because it’s important to Alexandria that our campaign can meet these moments and provide support in whatever ways we can.**
In order to make space for this work, we put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner. So now, we need your help to close the gap on our September fundraising before our mid-month deadline this Wednesday — this would ensure we’re on track to hit our Q3 targets before the FEC’s quarterly deadline at the end of the month.
**We’ve done the math, and if we can get four contributions from your area — we’ll be on track to meet our targets.**
[With just two days left before our mid-month fundraising deadline, can we count on you to be one of the four people we need from your area to close our fundraising gap and hit this goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-2507-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=2&refcode2=2507_2526796_j310ny&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-2507-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=21&refcode2=2507_2526796_j310ny&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)**
Every contribution allows our team to not only coordinate more relief efforts like these, but also pass legislation to prevent future climate disasters like Hurricane Ida and fight back against anit-choice legislation.
**Your contribution of any amount will make a huge impact on the work we’ll be able to take on in the coming months, and will help ensure Alexandria can continue to lead during these moments —** [please make a contribution right now to help us close our fundraising gap and keep Alexandria fighting for the better future our communities deserve.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-2507-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=22&refcode2=2507_2526796_j310ny&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-2507-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2507_2526796_j310ny&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210913-2507-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=24&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2507%2E2526796%2Ej310ny)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
I wish Election Day were today because if it was, Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate |
Fellow patriot,

I wish Election Day were today because if it was, **Republicans would win both the White House and the Senate**.

How can I be so sure of this? Biden’s **[TANKING APPROVAL NUMBERS](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6860338c38cd419cb0d5516a813c2d84&_e=OvZxe-E_oo-k661SXMtBKcw4uaKLpFVif7vZpRN6bh9UHZY3_qsvZB5oHHljOw0a_9E250GNjYhmDVBnzQi26MLQN5AdyIM_L7sSrd3ChNp038CYpKU_QZFtYdjc-uLas7UOmi1wP7ZkEw4RO-nrivVzfsfSSfbHsfGzLYHUZEue03usLoPoNYVf0S4Qxs3TF8V0HPAVJUiVSw5NSGLQGxlmdIqSmf7E40pTCa_HiMldRcIfGyVpUnIkQouHx0tAbBoyY-3MdZrz6McaFcHq3ZGjQIc_76ATQ5FZgkq741NiYj7aPjXuquKQzM-0GbeOHlEgtK-1zoxb-Y-hcePldHjSS7lk5rFAycCuEEM-HQF1iXibEQD_fqsEAKxOBm_YK_4xSLf7Zflhebj-oUsIERHhxKxnQoOIfkqEU5MtKxX0VHFWINN5vaLjL0PYwIvshVl05zI_9mJDzpbVfLCgsLjxh6_g87CEonv7tQ7xHOA%3D)**. A recent survey among the general electorate showed President Biden with an approval rating of just 43% **down 6% from July**. Among independents, it’s **even worse** at just 36%.

body:
I shot you an email on Friday about “Operation TaliBANNED”, and I’m happy to report that we pulled it off!

| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ye5bGgS8cd15xLpi50zpaQ/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg) | Patriot,

I shot you an email on Friday about “Operation TaliBANNED”, and I’m happy to report that we pulled it off!

Several weeks ago, I reached out to my friend, and cartoonist Bosch Fawstin and I asked him to commission art for this project, which I designed.

**You probably haven’t heard of Bosch, but Islamic terrorists have.**

Bosch is a former Muslim, and in 2015 he won the “First Annual Muhammad Art Exhibit and Contest”, but not without risking his own life in the process.

During the event, two ISIS terrorists, Nadir Soofi and Elton Simpson, armed with what the media called “assault rifles”, attempted to murder the participants of the contest that took place in Garland, Texas.

Thankfully, a Garland police officer, Greg Stevens, stood in their way and gunned them both down, killing them on site.

**Officer Stevens is just one reason why you Don’t Mess with Texas!**

Another man, security guard Bruce Joiner, was shot in the leg and **became the first victim of ISIS terrorism on U.S. Soil**. Luckily, Mr. Joiner survived.

The foiled attack was designed to punish Americans who dared to draw an image of Muhammad and send a message across the world just as they did with the Charlie Hebdo attacks in Paris, which killed 12 people.

But Bosch, the contest winner, was undeterred and is now more committed than ever to exposing Islamic terrorists along with anyone who supports them.

That’s why it was so important that Bosch took part in my operation, and I’m honored that he did.

As you know, I was permanently banned on Twitter in 2018 for posting facts about Ilhan Omar. Bosch was also banned from Twitter in 2018 for posting facts about Islam.

On the 20th Anniversary of 9/11, Twitter employees in San Francisco got an eyeful of their CEO, “Jihad Jack Dorsey”, as they headed into work, and the media ate it up!

Our posters were plastered around the city of San Francisco, and Twitter staff had to hang their heads in shame as they walked into their headquarters, knowing that they are actively enabling Islamic terrorists as part of their work at the social media giant.

The message was clearly received and acknowledged by leaders ranging from Congressman Paul Gosar to Dinesh D’Souza!

Any company willing to betray the safety of their own citizens by allowing the Taliban and other terrorist organizations to operate on their platform needs to be exposed!

It’s been 20 years since the most deadly terrorist attack on U.S. soil, and Islamic terrorists have more of an ability to communicate online than most Conservatives in America, including then sitting President Donald Trump.

I’m going to keep exposing this as long as I have your help.

We still have to [**raise $3,330 to cover this operation**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/6HjWgPCaGPrPXRsbNKJy3Q/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg), and I want to go ahead and fund our next few projects.

To do that, I had a limited number of special, aluminum prints made up of the exclusive artwork designed by me and Bosch, and [**with a donation of $100 or more**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/6HjWgPCaGPrPXRsbNKJy3Q/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg), I’ll have one shipped out to you!

To honor Bosch and the Texas officer who stopped the attack, the prints are being created by a local printer just outside of Garland, Texas, and the prints that you order will be shipped directly to you.

I’m commissioning only 911 prints, and they’re being produced directly on an 11x14 aluminum plate that can be mounted on a wall or used with an included stand for your desk.

[**You can support my work and further Free Speech activism by donating today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/6HjWgPCaGPrPXRsbNKJy3Q/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg)

Thanks so much for all that you do, and stay tuned for more.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/J11yG70aDrCiuAvMBW8GNg)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: CDC Records Show Teachers Unions Gave Guidance to CDC Director on School COVID Restrictions
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it received 12 pages of *records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National Education Association (NEA) influencing the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) Director and the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as well as school reopening policy. Additionally, the CDC Director states that she used the unions’ language in the CDC’s school reopening policy.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 13, 2021
---|---|---

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56664&L=25822&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLXJlY29yZHMtdGVhY2hlcnMtdW5pb25zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTMyMjMwMTA=) | **[Judicial Watch: CDC Records Show Teachers Unions Gave Guidance to CDC Director on School COVID Restrictions](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56664&L=25822&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLXJlY29yZHMtdGVhY2hlcnMtdW5pb25zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTMyMjMwMTA=)** Judicial Watch announced that it received 12 pages of *records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National Education Association (NEA) influencing the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) Director and the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as well as school reopening policy. ### [Biden Takes His Shot ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56664&L=25828&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYmlkZW4tdGFrZXMtaGlzLXNob3QvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMzIyMzAxMA==) Axios President Biden says he's met the enemy — and it's America's unvaccinated. The majority of U.S. sentiment may be with him. But Biden's still taking a major political risk, and he and his team know it. He's testing business leaders' resolve, putting Democrats' standing in swing states and districts on the line ahead of 2022's midterm elections and tempting a tsunami of litigation over new requirements that could touch 100 million Americans.

“The Biden White House previously said that the federal government had no role mandating vaccines, said Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch. “I suspect statements like this can and will be used in court against this unprecedented federal power grab." clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it received 12 pages of records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National Education Association (NEA) influencing the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) Director and the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as well as school reopening policy. Additionally, the CDC Director states that she used the unions’ language in the CDC’s school reopening policy. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 13, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced that it received 12 pages of records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National Education Association (NEA) influencing the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) Director and the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as well as school reopening policy. Additionally, the CDC Director states that she used the unions’ language in the CDC’s school reopening policy. = ---|--- | | | | = | = “As the Pelosi House seeks the confidential phone and social media records of countless Americans concerning January 6, its U.S. Capitol Police is covering up 14,000 hours of video about what really happened that day,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The U.S. Capitol Police should be required to explain under oath its reasons for refusing to turn over even one second of January 6 video to the American people.” = ---|--- | | | | | Weeks after giving a private college hundreds of thousands of dollars to “identify any existence of systemic inequities” in science, technology, engineering, and math fields (STEM), the U.S. government is doling out nearly $2 million to address racial and gender disparities in high school computer education. ---|--- | | | | == | == Texas’s heartbeat law is “a great development for the rule of law [and] for our nation’s morality and ethics,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton explains in the Weekly Update. As Fitton notes, the Left’s “apoplectic” reaction to the law is perhaps of little surprise to those who have actively engaged in the fight to protect the unborn. The law allows private citizens to bring civil actions over violations of the law which prohibits abortions after a fetal heartbeat is detected. == ---|--- | | | == Axios President Biden says he's met the enemy — and it's America's unvaccinated. The majority of U.S. sentiment may be with him. But Biden's still taking a major political risk, and he and his team know it. He's testing business leaders' resolve, putting Democrats' standing in swing states and districts on the line ahead of 2022's midterm elections and tempting a tsunami of litigation over new requirements that could touch 100 million Americans. “The Biden White House previously said that the federal government had no role mandating vaccines, said Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch. “I suspect statements like this can and will be used in court against this unprecedented federal power grab." == == Fox Business “Microsoft founder Bill Gates‘ international foundation has helped the Chinese Communist government in various ways, according to a newly-released batch of emails from the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases under Dr. Anthony Fauci, obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act request. == = The New York Post President Biden’s German shepherd Major attacked many more people than the White House has disclosed, according to newly released emails. The documents indicate that Major bit members of the Secret Service eight days in a row in early March — though only one such incident was publicly acknowledged.” = = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We have a few ideas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Every day seems to bring us a new excuse from West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin on why he’s opposed to long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities — investments that are supported by the rest of his party and the American people.
And yesterday, he went after bold progressives like Pramila for her urgent work to pass a historic Build Back Better package in addition to the bipartisan infrastructure bill:
_“What's the urgency? What's the urgency that we have?”_
**Well Senator Manchin, the urgency is around:**
👶🏾Child care for all kids and paid leave so parents don’t have to quit their jobs to take care of their children
🩺Health care coverage and Medicare expansion as the Delta variant surges
⛈Climate action as storms, fires, heatwaves, and flooding gets worse across the country
🏡Housing as we face an affordability crisis that leaves too many without a roof over their head
**Our movement is bigger than just one senator — and there’s real power in numbers, which is why it’s so important that we double down on our efforts to support Pramila’s work for a bold Build Back Better package.[If you're with us in this fight, can you contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today to help us win real benefits for working people across the country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-631&t=20&refcode2=631_420207_dpUyWy&akid=631%2E420207%2EdpUyWy) _Unlike Senator Manchin, Pramila doesn’t accept a cent from the corporate PACs trying to stop us:_**
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210913?refcode=em20210913-631&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=631_420207_dpUyWy&akid=631%2E420207%2EdpUyWy)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210913-631-footer&t=22&refcode2=631_420207_dpUyWy&akid=631%2E420207%2EdpUyWy)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need $34 today. Let me tell you why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Peter,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqIMC2hzHyPT2UdLS8-wJsdo352yBcwUh00ArVF3xwBMnFsl-hjpYwW9w_iTfe5Y-jwcQYpqU2Wh2YZIlYGQWCSZ0qGLeOlOh7-pbhebahCkEbJQEOUUU0-32EKX4vRCmwalliYyuuQuk6mZl6bDWgjtIBtNzMh6Lg7xr63RcFV8aUBtbQfCiOJCn87R8Mwa82spTa8M-75mLoy7OQ0XWEVlGD-T1jWOLd6IervnLdg7GA%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqIMC2hzHyPT2UdLS8-wJsdoqRnSQZt9wxDw5iCrgkSLzmlz9FCyZ3J5l4AEs3cEYJWcbYk8nzqeVJwDMRxRcl8p3bZezXxLr75DiMPnEd8HsfycBfWsPRAW-SPsVCOzzoDHLLAxT_tbsky437dhJ0oR2rYoMzYuvNJUhavypkqnF9pZbp5OrEbIcbOBRHPfdbwpyTarzahYvdhdZvuQPTjhCOcVaZk7LJBXEVqmvJHGmA%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqKpkapMj5Bzr53FWaZuSL24Z2c54MnMQTpCjXvb73mh-7PHtNFDNHaUJDd7U5lJI8_fy9ArO_Qg2ozhEMpke2m5Bu_OZ6NJDyZNcgcsWEo4fAT9zV1rHvUFJ8YxEVmqaKALMTaHvlvLjWD8QMdvoqYXTQJChXqVCeOUJjM9RUbRbgk6ScAAMSxHbXY07vAq0L-fg5rk2emdiAMOEx8KDboTSgeSgj4zplRJfeZNIx_U14ZU-arEWd9IKC7lI14jfpA%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, **[but I need your help.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqIMC2hzHyPT2UdLS8-wJsdoLs4yzKphQo2-YnCWC74WHNJz9tv3cTzSxLJLrsWxR6HdoPSt3fE0yEnM3ek71dh0OkD81f4CtRmtNPLqrw0J-1B7YlQiofsp5cioMmI-Xg04sRiQQY1GbiaCUQPTDSOplVuHopGg9GbHGgYIWeNOt3u85gIWGf5aQzcplMljYALgbVJRJe7PU80AM3Ij_R1Nm6vtZ7AUn0gOYedzrxK-Zg%3D%3D)** The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. **[So, if you can, please consider a gift of $34 if you can.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqIMC2hzHyPT2UdLS8-wJsdoeJxGzJHpdsalSFuHkHupJqwthr-y1cU-C9XNcZdmMFzc0J0S6gm0168ExAs_fEmiQW1MZmewE8t7zRmXlKeBr8oNVgbkuUB1xaW5FXmWasOKrhYUPefUlku92QlcyQUhreOEgYt3ZpHB21zcUYxtj_bDL1lYFSPayCoeIYJ8L1bMigTuiwIHq--AX8Tv3lVbgFngA3ooKw4DblTzi8C1qA%3D%3D)**

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqKpkapMj5Bzr53FWaZuSL24AOK86PnUEMGqcB89qNPW-Etzh1nRbn-1IXAdhFuWYXy3ZEMAFfkPIf67Ec6OkZyvRnZ7zQZsxVqHzq3N9Dg-ZCHsY5PFsKz3WjKhBgmcIiJrchmc48r8qyXRlmYovv4Gv9RUipmgGvOBVH0TuE-YKxvs37AoF5Ojxw4lAoZ0YRuYnhouaM1zXD8t1pdL4zRYRIEMvhs6dbfzdoeqRpBKbFoeiS7eICk0AaLjYkSfNTU%3D)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a4d4b77c0b68451297d2f7647fec4215&_e=7Yn1-NgwT-Km8yESHfjPvnol4vZAB7pgxJIyx9xC6zPzlZvupfxhBqDTM7zNmX0zLb0L5MFhMf1hk1xyAi2WpjSo6ybZO_Cli0uF85yKE0k45sgII0G-TGm7pQAyx1LTbFyL6A_DxIUWo-QHzU4cQ_2-3H3J56gymG5tgVjx5zMHioTGsym9VYay0zr8hfp-FCrDrbwF7w5m6COqsFdnGFkbgsQcEvcG2JlsRh04PqIMC2hzHyPT2UdLS8-wJsdot_pgQnEum2gdvVctpLc4QgOCl5SkU_9BCrQzcIwiAGydeqxYnj1hqhwVddRuNuDF6snTAq_c6-e377e9ZpeWD2FBUjZNElsMhLDX-m7C-LhH44HLT7S8R7Z1aagwcdaMgg0Nx47RV8qgWr6zrC08BUpEcAWiTmVjwXSJ0fD87A1gVLBxOncS2FvBgP0GzJqdSVHVld0ux-0ZcIw28Ro5rQ%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

clean_body: I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. | Peter, Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart. I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys. For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend. In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. My opponent has amassed a war chest of over TEN MILLION DOLLARS. If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field. I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career. We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and actually build a better America for hard-working families. My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years. And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand. I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. I hope to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. A donation of any amount will let me know you're on Team Herschel. Thanks so much. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Tim Ryan
subject: About to lose my damn voice!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ][IMG]

Folks,

I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my
damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay,
for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor, whether
it’s for their boneheaded opposition to the PRO Act or for their refusal
to vote for the Jan 6th commission.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy,
I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s FEC reporting
deadline is in just two weeks, and I need YOUR help to let the country
know that I’m not standing on my own.

Our public fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots
army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting
big things done for the American people. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2707?t=1007&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]So today, will you
pitch in a few bucks to help us reach our critical end-of-quarter goal
before the clock runs out?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2708?t=1008&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Donate $10
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2707?t=1009&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2709?t=1010&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2710?t=1011&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2711?t=1012&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2712?t=1013&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Other Amount

In the age of Citizens United, money talks. But together, we’re gonna show
the pundits and the national Republicans watching this race that we’ve got
a winning team that’s ready to see this thing through to the end.

Thank you,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2707?t=1014&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ]Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=850%2E3611125%2E4unsQV ][IMG]

name: our earnest plea (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: only $1 (re: Gavin Newsom)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| **We told you** with less than 24 hours until the pivotal California recall ends, polls show Republicans gaining on governor Gavin Newsom.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andy=20Biggs=20=2D=20House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: Fauci Lied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Dr. Fauci lied about his support for dangerous "gain-of-function" experiments in China. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/fauci-lied?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | Peter:

I’ve seen enough. **Anthony Fauci has to go.**

For almost two years, Dr. Fauci has ducked questions about where Covid-19 came from. He’s never come clean about U.S. funding of coronavirus research in Wuhan, China. And now we know why.

More than 900 pages of documents recently released under the Freedom of Information Act show that _**Fauci lied about his support for dangerous coronavirus “gain-of-function” experiments in Wuhan**_. Fauci’s misleading testimony before Congress has already been sent to the Justice Department for criminal review.

Yet Democrats continue to cover for Fauci and all the public health “experts” whose dishonesty contributed to a global pandemic.

**Conservatives must take back the House next year so we can remove Anthony Fauci and stop the public health lies.**

The best source of information about Dr. Fauci and his role in Covid-19 is the bestselling book, _"Faucian Bargain: The Most Powerful and Dangerous Bureaucrat in American History.”_

To help get this shocking story out to the country and to help build the case against Dr. Fauci, House Freedom Fund is giving away a copy of "_Faucian Bargain"_ with a [contribution of $25 or more](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=8b5ab920e3&e=b2c16e6198).

Your support will help tell America the truth about Dr. Fauci AND elect strong, tough, and principled candidates like:

✅ U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO)
✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA)
✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM)

Supporting candidates like these is the only way to defeat the liberals in both parties in 2022. And electing them to the House is the only way to hold Dr. Fauci accountable for his lies about funding the Chinese communists’ gain-of-function research.

[**Please support the House Freedom Fund with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=8e1b49bcbd&e=b2c16e6198)

**Your support will help us get answers and, more importantly, accountability for those who repeatedly lied to us.**

Why won't Fauci be honest about the research he funded in China? Why won't he tell the truth about live-saving early treatments to help Americans recover from Covid? Does he care more about hiding the truth and keeping people afraid than defeating the pandemic?

We need answers.

[**Please help HFF get the truth out about Dr. Fauci and also elect strong conservative leaders who will hold him accountable.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=2b68362ea9&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| ANDY BIGGS
U.S. Congressman, R-Arizona

---
|
---
| **EXCLUSIVE BOOK OFFER**
Donate $25 or more and get a copy of bestselling _Faucian Bargain_ by Steve Deace and Todd Erzen.
